| [](https://substack.com/redirect/848f252b-9a7c-4865-b8e6-646f5f9c594d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Whatever it is you celebrate, I hope you are reasonably content.
Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays, Happy Kwanzaa, and Kum Ba Yah.
A number of my fellow Democrats are spending time today cautiously scrolling Blue Sky, Facebook, Substack, and I suppose a number of other social media platforms.
Reading, reflecting, commiserating.
Maybe Democrats should say, "Have a Contemplative Holiday." "
"Merry" or "Happy" seems ambitious this holiday season.
The world seems different to us than it seemed on November 4, 2024. I daresay, it seems even lightyears away from that mindset since November 6, when we started to see cabinet nominations and the full cast of characters began to dance across the stage.
For example, I have a newfound urgency to participate in this late-stage capitalist democracy with the entry of Billionaire Elon Musk and his fellow oligarchs in our governmental processes.
We did not elect Elon Musk and yet he has an alarming level of access and influence on our government, even before his partner-in-crime Trump has been sworn in.
We should not even have to consider funding cuts for treatment of pediatric cancer while offering the green light for Musk to make more billions in factories in China.
We should not discuss raising the retirement age when billionaires make more per week than the average Social Security recipient gets in a year.
It's cold outside. Drop in on a local town meeting to learn about the challenges of creating warming centers. I'm not talking about residential shelters for asylum seekers. I'm talking about places where people who don't have adequate heat or housing could come in and get warm for a few hours. Can we beef up the funding in FEMA or HUD to fund more warming centers?
Healthcare premiums for most Americans are on track to increase by 7% in the New Year. A single person is paying around $513 per month in premiums. Then there are copays, money spent meeting deductibles, and prescription drugs.
The Brookings Institution estimates it would cost between $150 to $200 billion per year to extend Medicare for all. Elon Musk's personal worth is around $486 billion. Easy. I'm not proposing that we seize Musk's assets. I'm just comparing. One person's personal wealth to the cost of insuring the entire country.
It could be done quite easily. Just amend the rules for Medicare to eliminate the qualifying age of 65. In the stroke of a pen, we could have a Medicare option. Pay for it by raising the corporate tax rate back to the pre-2018 rates - and ACTUALLY collect the taxes!
If Americans wanted to hang on to their private policies to see how it all shakes out, then let them. In the meantime, offer a single-payer, Medicare for All system. Just in time for flu season.
This holiday season, I remain a proud Democrat, ready to demonstrate to voters that we are the populist party, ready to help with kitchen table issues, and committed to preservation of our democratic form of government.
I remain hopeful that I will be the Democrat on the ballot for the Special Election in 2025 in NY-21. Please find me at [www.paulacollinsforcongress.com](https://substack.com/redirect/b331ab12-e5e4-4b46-ab07-07c5378ed487?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Yes -- you can make donations there!
Rest up this holiday. We have some tough days ahead.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..cbxTcCG1PjSFPjChOtLQ7uwFde8mRXTQuPGPSwAIVHk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153621709)

name: =?utf-8?b?8J+Wiu+4jyBTaWduIHRoZSBUaGFuayBZb3UgQ2FyZCAodmlhIFZQUCk=?=
subject: Thank President Biden for his leadership >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, with Election Day behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency.**

So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country.

[**We need 20,000 good Democrats to sign it with us — read below and sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85643?t=6&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85643?t=7&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85643?t=8&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: Thank you.

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

You capped prices on prescription drugs.

You protected good-paying union jobs.

You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: _You will go down as a truly GREAT American President._

**I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do.**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85643?t=9&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85643?t=10&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18314%2E878179%2E0ikzUo)

name: Steve Daines - NRSC Chairman
subject: Say goodbye to 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

As 2024 comes to a close, we have a lot to be grateful for this year. President Trump will be President of the United States again, and we regained the Senate majority!

_**[But now we must look to 2025.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)** We will still be focused on supporting Senate Republicans as they fight with President Trump to Make America Great Again. _

We can't lose this majority we worked so hard to build after just two years. **[Otherwise, President Trump would be a"lame duck" president, and we would waste years of opportunities because our leaders would not have the political muscle they need.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)**

In 2024, many of our candidates entered their races facing 2, 3, 4, or even 5 to 1 financial deficits they were never able to close. **[Unfortunately, Friend, this cost Republicans multiple winnable seats in the U.S. Senate.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)**

**[Friend, would you please consider making a generous year-end contribution to support our Incumbent Republican candidates and GOP nominees fighting to secure critical seats we need to HOLD our Senate majority?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)**

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE BEFORE DECEMBER 31st>>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)******************************************************

We want our Republican incumbents and candidates to start on a solid financial footing in these can't-lose races. The Democrats have corrupt billionaires on their side and the lamestream media marketing their ideas free of charge.

We know money can be tight around the Christmas season, but we must help our candidates build war chests now so they are not stuck trying to fill a financial gap when they should be focused on winning.

**[Even if it's just $5, your support for Senate Republicans will help protect our new majority and strengthen Republicans' standing in Congress.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)**

Last month, we were outraised by Senate Democrats - we cannot let this happen again.

We want to finish December _and 2024_ on top. **[Please chip in whatever you can before the end of the year!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)**

Thank you,
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)
Steve Daines
Chairman, National Republican Senatorial Committee

P.S. Please don't let Senate Democrats beat us again. **[Before the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve, please send whatever you can to protect our Senate majority!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)**

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE BEFORE DECEMBER 31st>>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/yWM5fIedkJqIwgGcr7R4bw~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpT_)******************************************************

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn0nlrq0h2vmk8pd5u10tpcluhn7n0dar6j71of8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6cor2c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlut4bb5amcnftvntao9qjr0f0gg88eoaefnvedo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6cor2c5h2bs).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zob82ehanvvcv4c26fmef6ho3ji7emm9ed0fli8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6cor2c5h2bs)

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu1ne0j0r45qjqvvulk0l1shtd7l2ng0ho0dajn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6cor2c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge8o71c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr74v9sd2iehd89e6egs45m17et8liu9dssg8amg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6cor2c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsr4u07le0je0o494bd75jsi0k2erba5ef3n56pg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6clh60pj3c9gm49fg)

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Do you believe conspiracies exist?
body:
I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbakorvu2tf21p3jud15vtjps6t2j2dita04s0to_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care — because the truth is more important.

_The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_ sheds light on the disturbing episodes in our history that the government would rather keep hidden away from the American public.
* Operation Fast and Furious
* Nayirah and the Iraq War
* Operation Mockingbird
* Operation Paperclip
* Gulf of Tonkin
* Project MK-Ultra
* The Tuskegee Experiment
* Operation Popeye
* Operation Northwoods
* Unconstitutional Surveillance
* COINTELPRO
* And many, many more...

**Ever since 2020 and COVID, a popular meme has been saying how conspiracy theorists got it right. **

Here’s how you can help:

My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of Tuttle Twins to students in public schools, libraries, and families, including this book, _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_.

This is a book government schools are afraid of, but we're sending them anyway.

[As a part of The Tuttle Twins Year-End Fundraising Drive, when you donate $50 or more this month, I’ll send you a copy of _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_. With a donation of $250 or more, I’ll personally sign your copy.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgtq0clcod1pl3d7i4hjl424n4o564c17qta1puo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 - Receive a SIGNED Copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrh1pcs83ulrcnp2im6vin62mr8vgaqcr0sjpqko_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh6f26k9a77mnvivn260v2s676qtvnb1c368j82o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs) _**We’ve distributed over 6 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books worldwide! **_
The government and media are losing control over the narrative.

**The more we learn about the history of the federal government, the more we learn that some of the conspiracies we’re told to disregard are actually true.**

The true stories shared in this gripping book are more than just disturbing episodes of our history — they’re stark reminders of the ability of powerful people to shape world events and our own lives through deception and lawless corruption.

By illuminating these obscure corners of history, this book challenges people to question authority, seek the truth, and be skeptical of those in power.

You can help distribute more Tuttle Twins books to children and help them learn the truth. Please chip in and help us raise $20,000 this month for The Tuttle Twins Year-End Fundraising Drive. **[Donate $50 or more to receive your copy of _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z146fco0o8c3aiji7usf3rts7f435v6iprr4dobo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)**

[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhspb65o5le3ena0atd83jmdenuo4av6bp6gnc2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $50 - Receive a Copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkv4evdctvk14dfrs5jiqc6ddj23so5b6pe7pcm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $100 - Receive a Copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfkljn7fse6abn8em1pjkja71raf8jlaoc1gq7i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $250 \- Receive a SIGNED Copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl7k989b5vcftb2fjeql32rdnscg9gdmjh53at68_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $500 \- Receive a SIGNED Copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3jldh3sjgqc3jl5k7t9s87h8e2uqo7b008bmg7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 - Receive a SIGNED Copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztbcg3etapp2o76nhlct6cd5e09vp3v969pplln8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6aob4c3h2bs)
And the best part about this book?

Older kids enjoy it. They find it fascinating, and it allows them to bring hard-hitting truths with them to school.

Thank you, Friend,

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvff3h52hna23qrk1op1ssmr21o89f5ue1mj9iuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6eoj6c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7dinpcnugitv66s5jgt3t0lqb502lgrdqgsf50_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6eoj6c1h2bs).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ger4lk19v367olr7j4srgok0820juird8ohg4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6eoj6c1h2bs)

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfmno14jrussef1rvddgm39ahk8s90hmg7rr9b4g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6co74c3imcoh1k8gn48n24hjmcpb2c1jm4pj0c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8hql6pdrm4spt7j2mqnlvp8hmkb1sneg8a6nl40_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6eoj6c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ibineu8il7nq83tm9i2p9r3qsu0lmlqc3k3gbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g6eoj6c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life.

This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq5djt57iqte2vf7l0nbr31na1tlhm0q315tnid8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g61p36cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1b3ppb4flvfq5jjbvll0rv6scca8of4ihsti5r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g61p36cph2bs).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcsmse0gvi5prd61iq992l7nbiia0946e7lg49fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g61p36cph2bs)

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcphevtmeevfuu3vpllep5s5v3hpr3b8uq73qb50_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g61p36cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge8o75c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z83nrbe3hor8v2b5p51qq20sne5nkov20nb4gbr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g61p36cph2bs)_

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Do you believe conspiracies exist?
body:
I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care

|
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3u0plc0d21lnv245458sc3silrafk3p2u3hlrgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care — because the truth is more important.

_The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_ sheds light on the disturbing episodes in our history that the government would rather keep hidden away from the American public.
* Operation Fast and Furious
* Nayirah and the Iraq War
* Operation Mockingbird
* Operation Paperclip
* Gulf of Tonkin
* Project MK-Ultra
* The Tuskegee Experiment
* Operation Popeye
* Operation Northwoods
* Unconstitutional Surveillance
* COINTELPRO
* And many, many more...

**Ever since 2020 and COVID, a popular meme has been saying how conspiracy theorists got it right. **

Here’s how you can help:

My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of Tuttle Twins to students in public schools, libraries, and families, including this book, _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_.

This is a book government schools are afraid of, but we're sending them anyway.

[As a part of The Tuttle Twins Year-End Fundraising Drive, when you donate $50 or more this month, I’ll send you a copy of _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_. With a donation of $250 or more, I’ll personally sign your copy.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5o0fmvep1gaipcih0m48pb8r0cmvl25hol2aho0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zhlpv10e02mdlasbbo093jfccbfomrmbm15ps07g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3dknc21sdse74ark1s41edibom55gjm54apo6f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs)

[Donate $50 - Receive a Copy](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zg6vunvhuoq5k9fmu8hjo9igt6l8n1m8c55l7lg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs)

[Donate $100 - Receive a Copy](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zd9auslujs3aiate2sqco8q2mbl4vh1h82dvnmd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs)

[Donate $250 \- Receive a SIGNED Copy](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zr0o8ksuis0v7rlfmhked5n7aafge7ij7qcpm9j8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs)

[Donate $500 \- Receive a SIGNED Copy](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zddfed0btfhk0pn9fnripdedr5g5nmbacrcm7br0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 - Receive a SIGNED Copy](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zu1lgb9e3t7d6nd9b5t0q86uruk68bcf6iqelcsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs) [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5itq9350hsqj85s3lrtdm64osj441h32mi9vsmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9g69o34c3h2bs) _**We’ve distributed over 6 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books worldwide! **_
The government and media are losing control over the narrative.

**The more we learn about the history of the federal government, the more we learn that some of the conspiracies we’re told to disregard are actually true.**

The true stories shared in this gripping book are more than just disturbing episodes of our history — they’re stark reminders of the ability of powerful people to shape world events and our own lives through deception and lawless corruption.

By illuminating these obscure corners of history, this book challenges people to question authority, seek the truth, and be skeptical of those in power.

You can help distribute more Tuttle Twins books to children and help them learn the truth. name: Connor Boyack
subject: Do you believe conspiracies exist?
body:
I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfsqc5qed3d7d6bcsulah3d5qskj0eqd445up9b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i60o74c5h2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care — because the truth is more important.

_The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_ sheds light on the disturbing episodes in our history that the government would rather keep hidden away from the American public.
* Operation Fast and Furious
* Nayirah and the Iraq War
* Operation Mockingbird
* Operation Paperclip
* Gulf of Tonkin
* Project MK-Ultra
* The Tuskegee Experiment
* Operation Popeye
* Operation Northwoods
* Unconstitutional Surveillance
* COINTELPRO
* And many, many more...

**Ever since 2020 and COVID, a popular meme has been saying how conspiracy theorists got it right. **

Here’s how you can help:

My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of Tuttle Twins to students in public schools, libraries, and families, including this book, _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_.

This is a book government schools are afraid of, but we're sending them anyway.

[As a part of The Tuttle Twins Year-End Fundraising Drive, when you donate $50 or more this month, I’ll send you a copy of _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_. With a donation of $250 or more, I’ll personally sign your copy.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv1dah5pvm0engaf00iea4t56l6gp23geut2lvo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i60o74c5h2bs)

The government and media are losing control over the narrative.

**The more we learn about the history of the federal government, the more we learn that some of the conspiracies we’re told to disregard are actually true.**

The true stories shared in this gripping book are more than just disturbing episodes of our history — they’re stark reminders of the ability of powerful people to shape world events and our own lives through deception and lawless corruption.

By illuminating these obscure corners of history, this book challenges people to question authority, seek the truth, and be skeptical of those in power.

name: FINAL DEADLINE
subject: No! No! No!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We have one final deadline to meet. Can we do it?

|
---
| | |
January marks a new era in American politics. Republicans take control of Washington, and House Republicans are ready to get to work and get our country back on track.

But before we get there, we have one final deadline to meet: **[our 2024 end-of-year fundraising goal.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ukovksobm8036ju464gj31ab3t3f6l0hld4de8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i60o72cjh2bs "our 2024 end-of-year fundraising goal.")**

This is the last chance to make an impact before our new House Majority is sworn in.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmkfr7j02gp1084q1v0l8m5q618gjt6jpj88fsco_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i60o72cjh2bs)
---
| | | [HELP HOUSE GOP REACH THEIR GOAL](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd5o36cm55f5cggbh76j1eg019bdsvipmv0qhi78_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i60o72cjh2bs "Generic Button")
---

And it's not just about the inauguration - three special elections are looming on the horizon, and the outcome will determine whether we maintain our GOP trifecta. We need every resource at our disposal to win these elections and keep our majority intact.

**[That's where you come in. Your contribution of $25, $50, or $100 today will help us meet our deadline and ensure we have the resources to take on the Democrats and pass our America First agenda.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1cah17ov0bms51dtg01628ss3bip03jb393c7dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i60o72cjh2bs "That's where you come in. Your contribution of $25, $50, or $100 today will help us meet our deadline and ensure we have the resources to take on the Democrats and pass our America First agenda.")**

Democrats are already gearing up to take back the House and undermine our America First agenda. _**[We need your help to ensure we have the resources to fight back and deliver for America.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoo8hkdmq2reiofkab025p4gud6qrmv88gt36ru8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i60o72cjh2bs "We need your help to ensure we have the resources to fight back and deliver for America.")**_

body:

| |
---
| | | Friend - it's Allison from GOP HQ!

I am so sorry to reach out so close to the holidays like this, but I was just checking our records, and your response to our post-election GOP Support Audit is **MISSING ...**

body:

| [](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z05tf3voslg9mb7b6vorqk9o7s2bm8inmipq8sro_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i6apj0clh2bs) Dear Fellow Conservative, President Trump just made a bold move, naming Elise Stefanik as his UN Ambassador. This means her seat in Congress is about to become vacant, and the Democrats are salivating at the opportunity to flip it blue. We can't let that happen. The 2025 election is around the corner, and the Democrats are prepared to do whatever it takes to defeat us. They'll stop at nothing to undermine our values and push their radical agenda. That's why it's crucial we stand together NOW. **[CONTRIBUTE $25 OR MORE IMMEDIATELY to STAND WITH TRUMP and keep Elise Stefanik's seat RED.](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zb31bk3dl9csgi7k42rf2k2ph5e4dv9t06rph30g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i6apj0clh2bs)** |

body:
The Democrats are already circling, waiting to pounce on Elise Stefanik's vacant seat will you let them turn it blue?

| [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjdcrbvpd7dk52te1an311smclmmdqjhkc33n1t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i61p72c5h2bs) Fellow Conservative, **With President Trump's recent appointment of Elise Stefanik as UN Ambassador, her seat in Congress is about to become vacant.** And you can bet the Democrats are salivating at the opportunity to flip it blue. Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative, this is a critical moment in our nation's history. **_The Democrats will stop at nothing to defeat us and push their radical agenda forward._** We can't let that happen.
### That's why I'm counting on you to **[CONTRIBUTE $25 OR MORE IMMEDIATELY](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuqdvu791ms9mt5b254fbocnsm0kmjkn91jov80g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i61p72c5h2bs)** to _**[STAND WITH TRUMP](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr76l8cnlq83ugcibs2jnf2ht1h88l9gecu0vppo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i61p72c5h2bs)**_ and keep Elise Stefanik's seat _RED!_
Every dollar counts in this fight, and every minute counts. We can't afford to lose this seat, Fellow Conservative. The consequences would be devastating. But with your help, we can ensure that Elise Stefanik's legacy continues and that our conservative values are represented in Congress. So please, don't wait. **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm308qgjt2qn92up5jbiasvmkogp2165lcsdca08_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i61p72c5h2bs)** and help **[Elect Republicans](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z565ito9n8e89n4tojvs7n15e4acpmndtv2rm2oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9i61p72c5h2bs)**. |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T537cf2c8-2f2d-437c-b489-0a9654bd3c2f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

_December 26th, 2024_
---

**Hearing Protection
****Is A Must While Shooting**
---
| | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19480/6374453/b48563bad25969d975f38d0097bf1b9954fb7a04/46a5e3319376a3687684d8061808eeec4505d7eb)
---
A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right [hearing protection.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19480/6374453/b48563bad25969d975f38d0097bf1b9954fb7a04/46a5e3319376a3687684d8061808eeec4505d7eb) **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the safe hearing DB levels, at which hearing damage can occur quickly.** EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21, EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

**[Order Your Pair of EarArmor.com Earmuffs& Save 50% Off Today!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19480/6374453/b48563bad25969d975f38d0097bf1b9954fb7a04/46a5e3319376a3687684d8061808eeec4505d7eb)** On Your 6,

**Thank You.**

And you can bet the Democrats are salivating at the opportunity to flip it blue. Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative, this is a critical moment in our nation's history. The Democrats will stop at nothing to defeat us and push their radical agenda forward. We can't let that happen. That's why I'm counting on you to to and keep Elise Stefanik's seat RED! Every dollar counts in this fight, and every minute counts. We can't afford to lose this seat, Fellow Conservative. The consequences would be devastating. But with your help, we can ensure that Elise Stefanik's legacy continues and that our conservative values are represented in Congress. I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care — because the truth is more important.

_The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_ sheds light on the disturbing episodes in our history that the government would rather keep hidden away from the American public.
* Operation Fast and Furious
* Nayirah and the Iraq War
* Operation Mockingbird
* Operation Paperclip
* Gulf of Tonkin
* Project MK-Ultra
* The Tuskegee Experiment
* Operation Popeye
* Operation Northwoods
* Unconstitutional Surveillance
* COINTELPRO
* And many, many more...

**Ever since 2020 and COVID, a popular meme has been saying how conspiracy theorists got it right. **

Here’s how you can help:

My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of Tuttle Twins to students in public schools, libraries, and families, including this book, _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_.

This is a book government schools are afraid of, but we're sending them anyway.

I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care — because the truth is more important. The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies sheds light on the disturbing episodes in our history that the government would rather keep hidden away from the American public. Operation Fast and Furious Nayirah and the Iraq War Operation Mockingbird Operation Paperclip Gulf of Tonkin Project MK-Ultra The Tuskegee Experiment Operation Popeye Operation Northwoods Unconstitutional Surveillance COINTELPRO And many, many more... Ever since 2020 and COVID, a popular meme has been saying how conspiracy theorists got it right. Here’s how you can help: My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of Tuttle Twins to students in public schools, libraries, and families, including this book, The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies. This is a book government schools are afraid of, but we're sending them anyway. We’ve distributed over 6 MILLION copies of the Tuttle Twins books worldwide! The government and media are losing control over the narrative. The more we learn about the history of the federal government, the more we learn that some of the conspiracies we’re told to disregard are actually true. The true stories shared in this gripping book are more than just disturbing episodes of our history — they’re stark reminders of the ability of powerful people to shape world events and our own lives through deception and lawless corruption. By illuminating these obscure corners of history, this book challenges people to question authority, seek the truth, and be skeptical of those in power. subject: The days of government weaponization are over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Real reform is long overdue

Friend,

It's past time to reform the FBI, and **[Kash Patel is the perfect man for the job.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IX8LQ7QcQZYC8XdhAn9RiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpT8LKP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhdGVsLWZiaS1zdXJ2ZXktdGMtZS1wYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW8ybV9ucnNjX3BhJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDEyMjYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIzX25hX3BhdGVsZmJpc3VydmV5LXRjLXYxX1BBX3RjcnV6X25yc2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NFcDc3BjQgpnZWQtbWexug8eUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

**_[Cruz praises Patel as'very strong nominee'](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IX8LQ7QcQZYC8XdhAn9RiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpT8LKP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhdGVsLWZiaS1zdXJ2ZXktdGMtZS1wYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW8ybV9ucnNjX3BhJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDEyMjYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIzX25hX3BhdGVsZmJpc3VydmV5LXRjLXYxX1BBX3RjcnV6X25yc2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NFcDc3BjQgpnZWQtbWexug8eUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_**
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IX8LQ7QcQZYC8XdhAn9RiA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpT8LKP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL3BhdGVsLWZiaS1zdXJ2ZXktdGMtZS1wYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW8ybV9ucnNjX3BhJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDEyMjYmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIzX25hX3BhdGVsZmJpc3VydmV5LXRjLXYxX1BBX3RjcnV6X25yc2MmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9ZnVuZHJhaXNpbmcmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW10cG9zaXRpb249NFcDc3BjQgpnZWQtbWexug8eUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
_[via NewsNation]_

The FBI is an incredibly important institution to the rule of law in the United States. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Opportunities are better than in the past
body:
Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=adf728c857824795aa4608197f90ff6d&_e=M2UA6hrRRIwoke3C5e0oZ2BTlanJDKjS_8WXhnoLtwnmlvJuO0OuCJrpnjY9-jZM4gKcLRfXZ8Rto9x6RORWQcTsrehdmyINNJxOvMRRz4Y95CmQLNRxsi_jELdL9OKwFQLxPe9cEAq3J_ff0y3LFuQz61YNJzORcr4B0477XQkq_wGfT0vRIPbLpChp5oXfiV4_xGKXZbAZUW-FrJw7mOvVOZaJvdBu51-Xy4RcAYMbl4pZgu1mqBGs3Fr3-wlLIRYIIBH0cRJbWt-M643-HWt87tgfiFVapMAEZN6wUGYXwuIXhbtNTQNp07tuZNit-Yt8j7Tf6fa_xGxf_xWlycjx8-kNB1u4ElPR0aPNzCPM4LG5yzrzY4W2AHn7i8cAWSzC8Y7dOKrcGlLoI1O9hg%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=adf728c857824795aa4608197f90ff6d&_e=M2UA6hrRRIwoke3C5e0oZ2BTlanJDKjS_8WXhnoLtwnmlvJuO0OuCJrpnjY9-jZM4gKcLRfXZ8Rto9x6RORWQcTsrehdmyINNJxOvMRRz4Y95CmQLNRxsi_jELdL9OKwFQLxPe9cEAq3J_ff0y3LFuQz61YNJzORcr4B0477XQkq_wGfT0vRIPbLpChp5oXfiV4_xGKXZbAZUW-FrJw7mOvVOZaJvdBu51-Xy4RcAYOmvNFAZurSGij7lhAvCJu-7Et6h9bFVhfx2iDWzeYVE9W48o4JlXqNyEHMKyqk61GeE8M-8sAdYyZsgtVC7FBLcg_ONTbb2k5WWcINvFW_eHkVRfCP-4zY0mpuqetwhiX6JPCam3KKRYb-4hmCYsBcMQbD2B61oNqhaIk0XdafAA%3D%3D).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=adf728c857824795aa4608197f90ff6d&_e=M2UA6hrRRIwoke3C5e0oZ2BTlanJDKjS_8WXhnoLtwnmlvJuO0OuCJrpnjY9-jZM4gKcLRfXZ8Rto9x6RORWQcTsrehdmyINNJxOvMRRz4Y95CmQLNRxsi_jELdL9OKwFQLxPe9cEAq3J_ff0y3LFuQz61YNJzORcr4B0477XQkq_wGfT0vRIPbLpChp5oXfiV4_xGKXZbAZUW-FrJw7mOvVOZaJvdBu51-Xy4RcAYPCyXpAJBI2o0qeA8_Jlk3cE26ZOXhdLR2qgpU4bbB2KZLT3G5m4Q6mh0dE6P-khrbbTCtDxW7_wEYqjTJmRm3xVGoGIlolilmZYtimTi7PRa1hNha3HVGIDPLLdkYOehrpCN_spTMzImm-hukILvDiYiVhWRFG--EGEIQSvzpYRw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades. In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life. The need to push back aggressively has become urgent. Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past. We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation. That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education in 2025. The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help. . Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society. Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty. One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism." We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as Imprimis and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life. Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission. It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you. I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans. Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025. If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31. You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link: We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

body:
The Democrats are already circling, waiting to pounce on Elise Stefanik's vacant seat will you let them turn it blue?

| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=246af6e466e34947b4c043f80138d0b3&_e=EDTkgN9IpUjtwYcsRp1TWjqs6xMYSYq-h9YCmh7cLqf9DN6DsaHqCUIOx0vXCwi96ypqJDLSlcdxaKCLRNm7oSQ6B9OKSqqid1UEK6hH0HPlfMmLC-Uank2vRx_3cha6NgDX0SbnosXEvTdPtVAtHv5uBARzsH72EL-mqHdiblU9o0551VLL4Sms5vvnk6uHw0zPjwm471HXT1a_bZNjX-spgemz6_OGBlPcALK1ongUBly2Yj7E9aEyF6eDH02jX7BllGaUiG2ZqF2_7BJTJWHUkUT8NY7uYf4eKAdOWssw8qE1MFLe5V1cG_sx6qcE_60T707m3KvGa1nIRkxfaG6K-nIbddx3RfImk-ZColSk1Xy1ttin9U2VkW1Jk7z3XdRiWbEhksPDEUZuIj2qf6LqyBp4fWRSsFUt8xF1js5dUpqW9d1loP7GcmxqreNgHRPZs1PSrvFHNH44LCvx_41UFUJWzv3YiDsMjGGkNa60RhY6yLZbLW_cWROioe92PWWSjRVqr1bReKe-wxgy3jTDwoWAaX1hOSCeIBEWwfo%3D) Fellow Conservative, **With President Trump's recent appointment of Elise Stefanik as UN Ambassador, her seat in Congress is about to become vacant.** And you can bet the Democrats are salivating at the opportunity to flip it blue. Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative, this is a critical moment in our nation's history. **_The Democrats will stop at nothing to defeat us and push their radical agenda forward._** We can't let that happen.
### That's why I'm counting on you to **[CONTRIBUTE $25 OR MORE IMMEDIATELY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=246af6e466e34947b4c043f80138d0b3&_e=EDTkgN9IpUjtwYcsRp1TWjqs6xMYSYq-h9YCmh7cLqf9DN6DsaHqCUIOx0vXCwi96ypqJDLSlcdxaKCLRNm7oSQ6B9OKSqqid1UEK6hH0HPlfMmLC-Uank2vRx_3cha6NgDX0SbnosXEvTdPtVAtHv5uBARzsH72EL-mqHdiblU9o0551VLL4Sms5vvnk6uHw0zPjwm471HXT1a_bZNjX-spgemz6_OGBlPcALK1ongUBly2Yj7E9aEyF6eDH02jX7BllGaUiG2ZqF2_7BJTJWHUkUT8NY7uYf4eKAdOWssw8qE1MFLe5V1cG_sx6qcE_60T707m3KvGa1nIRkxfaG6K-nIbddx3RfImk-ZColSk1Xy1ttin9U2VkW1Jk7z3EktItv-jAY7ExKEUteR0pNljoU0jtHYtFy99-Gz7hu8RJzvmOmO3K9upch4XG3Dur3q7fk6MTpYdfv_OpUpHOOISNZP0V1q_hgODCpMMH8WLTLnUkW2WRi4ZnDoElKacc8otPbStkgbjPLYqeO5mEVU29BOPUQPcUIOgyqGWnx_7oIA4UKgHgKl40H7P0R-Q)** to _**[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=246af6e466e34947b4c043f80138d0b3&_e=EDTkgN9IpUjtwYcsRp1TWjqs6xMYSYq-h9YCmh7cLqf9DN6DsaHqCUIOx0vXCwi96ypqJDLSlcdxaKCLRNm7oSQ6B9OKSqqid1UEK6hH0HPlfMmLC-Uank2vRx_3cha6NgDX0SbnosXEvTdPtVAtHv5uBARzsH72EL-mqHdiblU9o0551VLL4Sms5vvnk6uHw0zPjwm471HXT1a_bZNjX-spgemz6_OGBlPcALK1ongUBly2Yj7E9aEyF6eDH02jX7BllGaUiG2ZqF2_7BJTJWHUkUT8NY7uYf4eKAdOWssw8qE1MFLe5V1cG_sx6qcE_60T707m3KvGa1nIRkxfaG6K-nIbddx3RfImk-ZColSk1Xy1ttin9U2VkW1Jk7z3XdRiWbEhksPDEUZuIj2qf5e2_UMLsLi45h0ZQybAvPGHZEosKVQfV4A-em57j3KuBUp6CW-N2vB9XMWZDr6rnV8fRfuHd2zuX4zb_Su1xCBFP2_VeCqH2QLDBVr40pEc5xRMQbJGS0jEX5f9cvspr6mDaplPAfMBzViXUv5Jewk%3D)**_ and keep Elise Stefanik's seat _RED!_
Every dollar counts in this fight, and every minute counts. We can't afford to lose this seat, Fellow Conservative. The consequences would be devastating. But with your help, we can ensure that Elise Stefanik's legacy continues and that our conservative values are represented in Congress. clean_body: The Democrats are already circling, waiting to pounce on Elise Stefanik's vacant seat will you let them turn it blue? | Fellow Conservative, With President Trump's recent appointment of Elise Stefanik as UN Ambassador, her seat in Congress is about to become vacant. And you can bet the Democrats are salivating at the opportunity to flip it blue. Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative, this is a critical moment in our nation's history. The Democrats will stop at nothing to defeat us and push their radical agenda forward. We can't let that happen. That's why I'm counting on you to to and keep Elise Stefanik's seat RED! Every dollar counts in this fight, and every minute counts. We can't afford to lose this seat, Fellow Conservative. The consequences would be devastating. But with your help, we can ensure that Elise Stefanik's legacy continues and that our conservative values are represented in Congress. So please, don't wait. and help . | Official Donor File EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #0[Redacted] DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $15 or more | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Together, we can make a difference. Let's keep Elise Stefanik's seat red and ensure a brighter future for our country. Sincerely, Elect Republicans HQ Need help? name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A moment I won’t forget
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWk-y6SWNl

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the
waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's
report on my father.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWk-y6SWNl

Hello
friend,

It was
November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting
room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on
my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he
just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so
they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back
into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic
cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can
do."

Of
course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question
that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do
you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know.
It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a
year. But attitude is everything."

That
struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the
doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's
longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his
attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James:
"Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you
can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That
statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about
the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those
that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:

Purpose over aimlessness

Perserverance over defeat
Faith
over worry

My book,
Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life, is being sent as a
thank-you gift to anyone who donates to Pathway to Victory's
ministry work this month.

Each one
of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what
is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications
to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I
want to help you make the right choices.

To get
your copy of Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life, you can
give a gift of any amount here:
https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1

I pray
that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a
believer!

Thank
you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and
the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it
without you.

Sincerely,

Dr.
Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If
you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send
you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal
and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series
on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here:
https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6563d17c55f24281900b7e029a977005&_e=nfM8prpPgWwxWqTj5NEWQF05iiSAfyiWMD_2We_049dSwms6GRn0YvPiBxGXMRBmduwjPAH2ZAhYPh4jTkLC0G1a-l4Ny-mPBju-j6BwusXHhdDfgOEhBngJNmg0fwvQ3ozb2XMDILPeeo66p69ZcDLkj7b5UMaziPN3ZZuNd8SbCbQW4wlKzrkXDoA60neV4jhSMjb9y0r5E0ixPzS3MF3-ZgkVlN8s2jTDPOkYlmjM0NXFlXrgbM-P9JztFX6m2J-86HL07Uc8gOWiYMCW-bBQLPOO2vI6s6tVIPvcPXJ7l8S2cqMFeJqpmhoQ4xScENQA8ajfnoxTQF2rTQPvGnlc9cuQ8Gy1D-Mi1hb_GaRaPJWF2aowhIBoe3Tx1RUY2_kbg5tbjiPlzFuM0FSY-A%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6563d17c55f24281900b7e029a977005&_e=nfM8prpPgWwxWqTj5NEWQF05iiSAfyiWMD_2We_049dSwms6GRn0YvPiBxGXMRBmduwjPAH2ZAhYPh4jTkLC0G1a-l4Ny-mPBju-j6BwusXHhdDfgOEhBngJNmg0fwvQ3ozb2XMDILPeeo66p69ZcDLkj7b5UMaziPN3ZZuNd8SbCbQW4wlKzrkXDoA60neV4jhSMjb9y0r5E0ixPzS3MF3-ZgkVlN8s2jTDPOkYlmgWjrQo0mT9-WaxA0TiD0V1pgPS8zuCGtK_942T4X6l_jHbNWqQQ3POkTSPubtWdebD3ifHWvtwBbJ6Vq0bieDZhDuSIXZi84iMXicznjGkKwMN1N0QK-rUr8w92RctQ9kMJ6qaHzQQ5lh5H-DW39r9c9ga6Pm0kQA_DUiug071cw%3D%3D).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6563d17c55f24281900b7e029a977005&_e=nfM8prpPgWwxWqTj5NEWQF05iiSAfyiWMD_2We_049dSwms6GRn0YvPiBxGXMRBmduwjPAH2ZAhYPh4jTkLC0G1a-l4Ny-mPBju-j6BwusXHhdDfgOEhBngJNmg0fwvQ3ozb2XMDILPeeo66p69ZcDLkj7b5UMaziPN3ZZuNd8SbCbQW4wlKzrkXDoA60neV4jhSMjb9y0r5E0ixPzS3MF3-ZgkVlN8s2jTDPOkYlmhPw5DWI89hqJ1mvM5zpxfNjYFTkHSAa6aX_5Lig3gOiBj9HCgQuGbIQQQsGP_vy9BbamBtFo5LCQ55RDnbeUNQjr0C1SaGBSKjYDba-jVPDw4o0oy6CbC87UAtcO5gnsZr2LJmOoC936u7f2AXJq49kQLLNGdtwlVEUYAwlsooLg%3D%3D)

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=6563d17c55f24281900b7e029a977005&_t=qpWjmhD0zpciC1CmUsPv3uSVaPOR7LSlHMEQ3To5QZzI3Th51C2jf0G4gQ_PJPSbG9s_2qtZwLGX7iLeWKVk1e_TRVgHZApyVoOVwG6r0Jk0svIROugddqV9DDS0meYLNPb9ctKlL9qYZtmvhs91ZTrAYUnSQk77XbHyhgFQodg%3D)

As a proven ally of the President, Jimmy will fight every day to secure America's future and defend our way of life. But the Democrats are targeting this seat in the upcoming Special Election, and we cannot afford to lose it. The latest election results have shown us just how narrow our majority is - with only 220 House seats to the Democrats' 215, every single seat counts. name: History Facts
subject: Why it's called "Boxing Day"
body:
Celebrated on December 26, Boxing Day is a public holiday in the United Kingdom and several British Commonwealth countries including Canada, Australia, and New Zealand. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cbudl560y6m3rsw7ai7bssbgeq58bbeiwbkqac0cs0g9tgk31mz104zjki23xapnrtl5txxos5uml1ul2v75g8xkmflkbudg600gm6h0kth7bxcjo3em796z1egbkgyfqm73pk41ol6wnje&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Boxing Day is named for gift-giving — not the sport.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| C elebrated on December 26, Boxing Day is a public holiday in the United Kingdom and several British Commonwealth countries including Canada, Australia, and New Zealand. And while its participants may feel like going a few rounds with the relatives who gave them yet another pair of Christmas socks, the holiday has more to do with the season's spirit of generosity than the hard-hitting sport.
---
Although the Oxford English Dictionary [traces](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the first published mention of the term “Boxing Day” to 1743, the acts associated with the day are significantly older, and stem from murky origins. One popular [theory](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) is that the holiday grew from the tradition of distributing the donations collected in church alms boxes to the poor on December 26, a date historically celebrated as St. Stephen's Day (or the Feast of St. Stephen) in honor of the charitable Christian martyr. Another widely cited belief is that members of the upper class once filled Christmas boxes with food, money, and small gifts and gave them to the household staff to enjoy on December 26, a well-deserved day off after spending Christmas Day in servitude.
While the charitable elements of the holiday have largely faded, Boxing Day still offers its share of modern traditions. Though its origins aren’t sporty in nature, the day off is considered a good time to enjoy sports, both for the energetic folk who seek to work off their Christmas dinners and the contentedly relaxed who want to tune in to a full slate of soccer games on television. Additionally, Boxing Day has emerged as a big retail day in the mold of Black Friday, which means the opportunity to snag a few more end-of-year savings, as well as the chance to return those unwanted socks as quickly as possible.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp3oc3&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## One of pro boxing's most famous matches took place on Boxing Day.
More than half a century before Muhammad Ali became "the Greatest" for his power and showmanship in the ring, Jack Johnson was displaying similar attributes as one of professional boxing's most formidable figures. The difference was that while Ali faced racism in his time, Johnson was flat-out denied the opportunity to compete for the world heavyweight championship because he was Black. That finally changed when reigning champ Tommy Burns accepted the $30,000 offer from Australian promoter Hugh D. McIntosh to fight Johnson, setting the stage for the highly anticipated showdown in Sydney on Boxing Day 1908. Ostensibly a match between two premier participants, the event was far too one-sided in Johnson's favor to be considered a fair fight. Although police eventually jumped into the ring to ward off the spectacle of the white boxer getting knocked out, there was no stopping the cultural impact of Johnson becoming the sport's first Black heavyweight champion.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Do you believe conspiracies exist?
body:
I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care

|
---
| | [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyU0LFq9DAQBOCnkTsba-VflgsVPxzuLm1KsZIXnzhZFtI6ef2Qg0Da1APDN_N-d3eMKeb9DQ-yz1Bdbe4s7PhiTtSHM7cSK4bmYISpl9CDdtBtdluCRt2RlbP6ByCNHruHXQiWZTM4aWnkiMp4qfwsg59o3uTsu2i_eySAljAZkEMwtBgAhTOQx0mJacRElYcnUQln3iu1VqlcPsWAeQjn0SX7YC5NqP8CVgFro3BVGlL0VBnbcNZdwFqw53r92hCpCbVefLiAR8G4Z6FuPxwB-pWcmSmzULdnqF21W_mMKcWmZzGN-4ExvQT8h68-LHwFAAD__9zVdP0 "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

I wrote this book to spread the truth in a world filled with lies. I reckon some schools will ban it, but I don’t care — because the truth is more important.

_The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_ sheds light on the disturbing episodes in our history that the government would rather keep hidden away from the American public.
* Operation Fast and Furious
* Nayirah and the Iraq War
* Operation Mockingbird
* Operation Paperclip
* Gulf of Tonkin
* Project MK-Ultra
* The Tuskegee Experiment
* Operation Popeye
* Operation Northwoods
* Unconstitutional Surveillance
* COINTELPRO
* And many, many more...

**Ever since 2020 and COVID, a popular meme has been saying how conspiracy theorists got it right. **

Here’s how you can help:

My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION copies of Tuttle Twins to students in public schools, libraries, and families, including this book, _The Tuttle Twins Guide to True Conspiracies_.

This is a book government schools are afraid of, but we're sending them anyway.

body:

|

I hope you're sitting down for this, Friend.

A few days ago, House Republicans launched our biggest goal of the year, our** $1 MILLION End of end-of-year fundraising goal.**

Well, guess what.**If we continue at our current pace, we 'll MISS our goal by hundreds of thousands of dollars, and Democrats will have one happy new year.

We can't let that happen, Friend. _It 's time to up the ante. _**
**[To close the gap , House Republicans leadership has made the decision to authorize a special 2X MATCH on ALL donations made towards our End of Year goal!
