name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7d89e5f563be44a6976c1673d490d742&_e=fZwOqLHABNyrFBq_D6ncutiDJpT4ZrukWUgxAp_vSq3LqIWum7ofhyFWFeoqXnDROZ349KVR1WPp6VhHA41fh3WsXcpbUhfslzq2ITYPKTiYZxAcYEK5g_foU6ga5QiGrby6t1-W_r94NWDPi3Vkbu43DCSs3CvLVX4IBC-Xze6XSvwKeG5cxiQomS_2feS2VHaWWa3f2FU8V6BVnQn8T-4YhA_dJdwiQ6SPDHH5Yr6cCaScVAW-Ffd2yzOrwmdQGKw8CrvDP14rj8PYXECoaJYeiegNA6wHe-Y_owXZT4Am9zpB48ED3jRLt-1w8dnZ9Ccb3UTnr2d-gLbstQ_OQCvhpNrVkkPdpdkYG-UGGiSmRT8hBDf2oJ_pq_45dmsywMDldL7G1npJOw6LUksjiA%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7d89e5f563be44a6976c1673d490d742&_e=fZwOqLHABNyrFBq_D6ncutiDJpT4ZrukWUgxAp_vSq3LqIWum7ofhyFWFeoqXnDROZ349KVR1WPp6VhHA41fh3WsXcpbUhfslzq2ITYPKTiYZxAcYEK5g_foU6ga5QiGrby6t1-W_r94NWDPi3Vkbu43DCSs3CvLVX4IBC-Xze6XSvwKeG5cxiQomS_2feS2VHaWWa3f2FU8V6BVnQn8T-4YhA_dJdwiQ6SPDHH5Yr6cCaScVAW-Ffd2yzOrwmdQVlutrMvwXdf7FJwJM3hoWVmjqLjjtI0U4ipmtpxWQ-52pkcVnAOml_jCxTHW4msEqDoRLbFDzUGGZQ7NBDbFMNJHuI1ND_yspEEuvIMRnrtaCPQN4_6a-s0j3YrnU4ObGLESLbT2pzRXXb3azO-dkA%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8991d3d32c344590ad55b254e9b0b55a&_e=9QRZAVAA_RYbwYqVdlY_VMCADJU8zzBDClKiMYGnImOSxuwo1XOsqP1KNOoZflKdryAZyX0ZSCNhOqwBYwMdt5n0ImDu7P8MYlu_C0cGyrr9Oi4wEq8TDMC8g8AldQkeNWE-VX5esk29w_eH6H-HIszxo1d-KWtmdJGR67HVsl0yPJOUFo3ykquNyM8-QjcnTKIkt9xH45XuBrUbmgwAB4sEr7tzMiD-XUHdYlC5aYWA8mucbg_bRzTUpvnvpZr92n-PFRYbEbBq09yFuoFQJPkZxUPptehUcx4Kj4OAH830ss3Nm88IraiNzAjdfjeouYIOWMG9gPzm4YpRjHbWpalbLo-xrChBx7qOgmGpzJD97rQ0zKQVVoGLWpR_JHEaWVnGcgJ0aVDcVtVpFGoBqofChfBbtP9ePLZVXfCI_HY%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8991d3d32c344590ad55b254e9b0b55a&_e=9QRZAVAA_RYbwYqVdlY_VMCADJU8zzBDClKiMYGnImOSxuwo1XOsqP1KNOoZflKdryAZyX0ZSCNhOqwBYwMdt5n0ImDu7P8MYlu_C0cGyrr9Oi4wEq8TDMC8g8AldQkeNWE-VX5esk29w_eH6H-HIszxo1d-KWtmdJGR67HVsl0yPJOUFo3ykquNyM8-QjcnTKIkt9xH45XuBrUbmgwAB4sEr7tzMiD-XUHdYlC5aYWA8mucbg_bRzTUpvnvpZr9O2bd9ejxLezonndf9mg5VyKMdVFhSLc_KaqIikOqW9Z_h1vDHKg1ac5ZjM9-okG3uqbJpuiry-tEgQ_SB1K9PqWrW-cikPpJXK5VcWOKJYgpjTGxEcmg2C806Qrz9NWW2KxHqO2eHOassUUEALy-PbNgYXCPThZv84gEPFlzJ-s%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8991d3d32c344590ad55b254e9b0b55a&_e=9QRZAVAA_RYbwYqVdlY_VMCADJU8zzBDClKiMYGnImOSxuwo1XOsqP1KNOoZflKdryAZyX0ZSCNhOqwBYwMdt5n0ImDu7P8MYlu_C0cGyrr9Oi4wEq8TDMC8g8AldQkeNWE-VX5esk29w_eH6H-HIszxo1d-KWtmdJGR67HVsl0yPJOUFo3ykquNyM8-QjcnTKIkt9xH45XuBrUbmgwAB4sEr7tzMiD-XUHdYlC5aYWA8mucbg_bRzTUpvnvpZr9eJ85v43BscLBiC5S72U6X3_Lm4Z-60S9l-RptZHhg2FKwY6DLT0aRfNQqvF_Sjr_7Cxyr5LixvqFxWTPKuDidLQOrlntJF0tNtRcTjEQ6QTEaK4RHQclSpS3AWCBYYdGjyc5zhvhJt2gmm5aWmrhVS3DcnQWK8GxFtrqh0ebdFs%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8991d3d32c344590ad55b254e9b0b55a&_e=9QRZAVAA_RYbwYqVdlY_VMCADJU8zzBDClKiMYGnImOSxuwo1XOsqP1KNOoZflKdryAZyX0ZSCNhOqwBYwMdt5n0ImDu7P8MYlu_C0cGyrr9Oi4wEq8TDMC8g8AldQkeNWE-VX5esk29w_eH6H-HIszxo1d-KWtmdJGR67HVsl0yPJOUFo3ykquNyM8-QjcnTKIkt9xH45XuBrUbmgwAB4sEr7tzMiD-XUHdYlC5aYWA8mucbg_bRzTUpvnvpZr9NX1ZvUBZkkSFmfJkjJbnegwZrODn4JP607ZaVzO2o1HYvrIe1fBh_3Jrqfr6Y5mZoJAT4p1Eq8OV-pNlv5tsKQWag8HE2GwbdV9BmyX0Ex9K0aJgeAxeXlmZPzGeq8GGJN5hjjVMLe6JNzrR7zNiEmJpuvJP8FKxfs_0Fu3pvws%3D)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---

Kari Lake

Financially destroy me and my family.Today I’m asking you to join me and build the **“First Amendment Fund”** that will help me win my case. With enough grassroots firepower, we will end this lawfare and take back our country. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8991d3d32c344590ad55b254e9b0b55a&_e=9QRZAVAA_RYbwYqVdlY_VMCADJU8zzBDClKiMYGnImOSxuwo1XOsqP1KNOoZflKdryAZyX0ZSCNhOqwBYwMdt5n0ImDu7P8MYlu_C0cGyrr9Oi4wEq8TDMC8g8AldQkeNWE-VX5esk29w_eH6H-HIszxo1d-KWtmdJGR67HVsl0yPJOUFo3ykquNyM8-QjcnTKIkt9xH45XuBrUbmgwAB4sEr7tzMiD-XUHdYlC5aYWA8mucbg_bRzTUpvnvpZr9PeNX10mPTLJhOlJG-gYiMfYMRZelN3hVabWkg0bJpJxiw_geRbCGjBsmgoFRJn17kQo12HW0owqYco-AGok-ii-aNOLWnaPqP0IgpKX4jIxZBqM7yM_5t-_2SVRKVH8tg_UJFDVMOilTc1DWrBegayz4GeKmjlmgsI4bWwT0-VM%3D)**

———— END OF YEAR FUNDRAISING UPDATE ————

[MATCH MY HOLIDAY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)

USO Supporter,
The holidays can be one of the most difficult times of year for deployed service members. **We fell short of our critical goal to fund 3,000 holiday meals and other programs for our military heroes, but our generous partners at Airbus are now matching all gifts, up to a total of $25,000, until midnight to give us one more chance to reach our goal.**
That means you still have one more chance to DOUBLE the value of your holiday gift for service members: **[Will you make a tax-deductible donation now that will be MATCHED* to provide active-duty service members with warm holiday meals and connections to home?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[$37.50 CAN HELP FUND
1 HOLIDAY MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP FUND
2 HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj3DEzhZ/b3JWSkR6YzJwdjJBWFJaTjJPdnM1cGIzTUNJdmM4Mk1zWmR0dlowZVMzY2ZaeVVsakQvSDgwRWVESGJYWVhkRHBnSzI3K25wSE1mdEZaRFpCa0JVYkNrQ2J6QlltTk8zdXBiUXA2bXFENmc9S0/OWx6bUpaMzlRcE1oeTBHTTVrUFBDZHlKNm9aMW9qWjZNKzZjT1FuelJWM3hWR2R1enNWdUt3bWlySXYvc0FQU1ZaRVdMRUFjK2RLa0hDNEdaalBjYVJTM2lMUDU5ejNkS0)
---
[HAVE ANOTHER AMOUNT MATCHED ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/WYqRCrgZ_2BA/b3JWSkR6YzJwdjJBWFJaTjJPdnM1cGIzTUNJdmM4Mk1zWmR0dlowZVMzY2ZaeVVsakQvSDgwRWVESGJYWVhkRHBnSzI3K25wSE1mdEZaRFpCa0JVYkNrQ2J6QlltTk8zdXBiUXA2bXFENmc9S0/OWx6bUpaMzlRcE1oeTBHTTVrUFBDZHlKNm9aMW9qWjZNKzZjT1FuelJWM3hWR2R1enNWdUt3bWlySXYvc0FQU1ZaRVdMRUFjK2RLa0hDNEdaalBjYVJTM2lMUDU5ejNkS0)
---
Right now, instead of spending time with their families, our service members are deployed all over the world making immense sacrifices to serve our country.
The least we can do is give them the opportunity to sit down for a warm, hearty meal after another long day away from their loved ones. No matter how far their service takes them, it's up to us to find a way to deliver a taste of home.
"I couldn't be home ... so you brought home to me," a service member shared after a holiday meal in Japan. "Thank you for everything you do, USO."
**[Please : Can we count on you to rush a Christmas gift to support our brave military heroes this holiday season? If you make a tax-deductible donation of $37.50 or more before midnight tonight, it will be DOUBLED by Airbus to help fund even more holiday support for our service members.](https://links.e.uso.)**
[DOUBLE MY HOLIDAY GIFT FOR SERVICE MEMBERS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~Cyp2qRBm/b3JWSkR6YzJwdjJBWFJaTjJPdnM1cGIzTUNJdmM4Mk1zWmR0dlowZVMzY2ZaeVVsakQvSDgwRWVESGJYWVhkRHBnSzI3K25wSE1mdEZaRFpCa0JVYkNrQ2J6QlltTk8zdXBiUXA2bXFENmc9S0/OWx6bUpaMzlRcE1oeTBHTTVrUFBDZHlKNm9aMW9qWjZNKzZjT1FuelJWM3hWR2R1enNWdUt3bWlySXYvc0FQU1ZaRVdMRUFjK2RLa0hDNEdaalBjYVJTM2lMUDU5ejNkS0)
---
Thank you for supporting those who sacrifice so much to serve us and our country.
--The USO
*Airbus is matching all gifts to the USO, dollar-for-dollar, up to a total of $25,000, through December 26, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

## A clash is coming in the Middle East * WorldNetDaily * by David Brummer
JERUSALEM – It was Bashar al-Assad, the recently-deposed dictator of Syria who once said, “It is difficult for anyone to tell you what is going to happen. [The Middle East] is an area where everything is on the brink of explosion.” How right he was, and how ironic it was at least partly his own [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=cb7f78669f204fc6aeb472072fe33d1f&_e=_TqeKBWQi7XCwSQn3RXorjc-YVmQksd-CjnH5ykbiBCqKOC75iJfpqA_rSsPHf5gMT7iZwdIx93TtCF7zNUoZuI_fyNmz_oHN0Bn2ArhZxrJhXuAnDp6n6VpKuy7Zib-TQbOFMqiPQMeFc38EQrm1-CFWTdcjPTt9xRomcm0KXgEXrOqanEJWlRjCjcV4hUBXnABOwByVWjeU0t2Jnm9KtXGqs8ex8CT0ppvIhCkNBcFCSKYRhQ4myp2luSAv7_zD0CpmTK6-OffLHkdU2d9G9WbMswt5ewcBNiKpVeadQ8%3D)

## Anthony Scaramucci on CNN Makes Weird Mob Boss-Esque Threat Against Elon Musk – RedState
With his endorsement of Donald Trump and the subsequent Republican victories in the 2024 election, tech billionaire Elon Musk has only seen his influence grow. Naturally, that has made Democrats and their press allies very angry because only their wealthy supporters are allowed to get involved in politics. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: The real cost of progressive vanity
body:
Terry Tracy | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2d8678a93f&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **__Terry Tracy_ : Progressive dreams lead to shattered trust in local government_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=93ac0a4fae&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "Governance, like light, brings clarity and purpose when concentrated and near. Yet, when allowed to drift too far from its source, it becomes distant and scattered. Losing its focus, it creates darkness, confusion, and disarray.

Throughout history, a straightforward truth remains steadfast — representative governance is most effective when it remains closest to the people it serves.

Conservatives have long championed this philosophy, not out of disdain for government, but out of a deep respect for the autonomy of individuals and communities. This core principle is experiencing a renaissance on the national stage with efforts like the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

Yet the local level is where this principle perhaps shines the most brightly, where the consequences of governance — whether prudent or reckless — are immediate and tangible..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=938777f55b&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")

|

Read more columns on [w](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=742e5fea7f&e=b7b3eddce2)[ww.broadandliberty.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5e2307b21f&e=b7b3eddce2) — updated daily and as news breaks.

---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you our urgent poll asking if you support pardoning January 6th insurrectionists after Trump made that one of the priorities for his first day.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond.** Our data for your state is incomplete without your responses.

So we’re re-opening our poll and giving you a second chance to complete it. **[_Click HERE or use the button below to sign »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241226_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22682%2E4449941%2EFrQhvR)** | [COMPLETE POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pardon_insurrectionists/?source=FFR_20241226_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22682%2E4449941%2EFrQhvR)

We’ve attached the original poll below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

To: Top Democrat
**We’re nauseous with anger:**
[ ]()
Americans are FURIOUS with Trump for scheming to pardon January 6th insurrectionists despite the fact that they tried to overthrow our government.

If we can show MASSIVE public outrage over this move, we can force Trump to walk back his promise.

**So we need input from all Democrats ASAP:**
* * *

–--SAMPLE OF THE THANK YOU PRESIDENT BIDEN CARD BEGINS BELOW–--
Dear President Biden,

I wanted to take a second to **_thank you_** for all that you have done for our country over the past four years.

You created a model for what good, strong Democratic leadership looks like.

You put the American people’s interests first and created millions of jobs, defended democracy here and abroad, and passed historic climate legislation.

As we step into the New Year, I want you to know that thousands of Democrats just like me are energized and prepared to build on your accomplishments. **[That’s why I’m signing this card to THANK YOU and show my commitment to keep fighting for the Democratic agenda in 2025 so we can keep electing Democrats and defend democracy! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99297541/519474181/-2109688963?refcode=NDCAF_20241226_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmQ3NzI0Mi05ZWMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ZBSb5L_0Hj8kAYkcTiVYEGU0lKg-0wnUzKTm2BxUDg=&emci=90e925a4-11bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=2bd77242-9ec3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THE THANK PRESIDENT BIDEN CARD »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99297542/519474182/-2109688963?refcode=NDCAF_20241226_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmQ3NzI0Mi05ZWMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ZBSb5L_0Hj8kAYkcTiVYEGU0lKg-0wnUzKTm2BxUDg=&emci=90e925a4-11bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=2bd77242-9ec3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=48524772)

CNN republican Scott Jennings **[silenced his democrat colleagues](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9a4580-b8bc-4f44-adb1-a3b4ad44f600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with one simple truth bomb: Trump is right to sue to media because they have been LYING about him for so long!
**[Watch their expressions drop as they realize he is 100% correct](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9a4580-b8bc-4f44-adb1-a3b4ad44f600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and Trump could be coming after them next.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9a4580-b8bc-4f44-adb1-a3b4ad44f600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9a4580-b8bc-4f44-adb1-a3b4ad44f600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The heated live debate follows Trump's legal victory over ABC News for defamation after George Stephanopoulos repeated the false claim on his show that Trump is "liable for rape." Trump was paid $15 million in the defamation settlement.
Now, many other networks could be exposed to the same legal consequences after years of loose accusatory language, as well as telling complete lies, when describing Trump and his allies.
"Is he trying to intimidate the media with this strategy?" Abbey Philip, host of CNN NewsNight, asked Jennings.
"He is well within bounds to play the game that he thinks they're playing against him," Jennings answered. "Why can't people just be precise?!! Look what happened to ABC. They were not precise with what they said, and you can't be so flip with this information when we're talking about the public affairs of our country."
* * *

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: For the cause of liberty
body:
You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5ceb0836ff03417b9bf7476f40d1e80d&_t=bWiOfRjR0IlDsLHJrHBKqIZADPuqAQ562VR-aSuRDBPQmTVOrZkUu9tzDoooskU1c8eU_Iw4sq_26dcC4QqDRo_f1IcLA30e6sg3r2lqmpObjDAXRvduedvFCF7RrjRa)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5ceb0836ff03417b9bf7476f40d1e80d&_e=Sd8PYZ-RHja5ZHBvQalgHFlK-PBkRXLNBkfovWye_hHUq3PRlTLJ3bM6ow4m3FrABuTabHBuJtiF5wciZs6jaI65bx1w9Xn2eYF1coBFTIrfdIQAO6IXI2JuGiXNFiaKUvCioEoGvVPJyfmGRxUXTd1TB7F13PmjKn8IFYomwXtbaucGytfuNMdiIAHFxjTDhJyRxinQlD54xcwK2xIEC2TBEIqE8vIstGNGiDYlXiTU_oSr0TZ0dCnSsre5MkIzE1FEUzCqnDMw-2_0XJvvUYj2O0FwfnDsgvUz7HOkT9bKUn4n8dTt3eWMStIjBFsxtCNrYn28tD44Gmh_aD5LJH3ZY9OIMF6EfTDCnRjKff4Uou4CFpb5aWP8qQOck806)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5ceb0836ff03417b9bf7476f40d1e80d&_e=Sd8PYZ-RHja5ZHBvQalgHFlK-PBkRXLNBkfovWye_hHUq3PRlTLJ3bM6ow4m3FrABuTabHBuJtiF5wciZs6jaI65bx1w9Xn2eYF1coBFTIrfdIQAO6IXI2JuGiXNFiaKUvCioEoGvVPJyfmGRxUXTd1TB7F13PmjKn8IFYomwXtbaucGytfuNMdiIAHFxjTDhJyRxinQlD54xcwK2xIEC2TBEIqE8vIstGNGiDYlXiSOjS_ix8OSYxOxtVGgSfsxxcXBmpZ8WQhdj4GHHHuR4dqshDlrCrpamuavBjCVBqtuNW-wa2VjWjgmZTKyAoP9jt-k2MVyTCurqoyUnR6USUqYyTbwfQsnqTw05MIs4R1K9f7MoqpFmc3roZb9peW6).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5ceb0836ff03417b9bf7476f40d1e80d&_e=Sd8PYZ-RHja5ZHBvQalgHFlK-PBkRXLNBkfovWye_hHUq3PRlTLJ3bM6ow4m3FrABuTabHBuJtiF5wciZs6jaI65bx1w9Xn2eYF1coBFTIrfdIQAO6IXI2JuGiXNFiaKUvCioEoGvVPJyfmGRxUXTd1TB7F13PmjKn8IFYomwXtbaucGytfuNMdiIAHFxjTDhJyRxinQlD54xcwK2xIEC2TBEIqE8vIstGNGiDYlXiRCqb9YMk0KE30eldBJgxo641u0oMv6CQJ8Bh_wJ7YLNIAa1nup4w36Ux0hgcYkAdZe2DDANETmDagBPOk4W-yiONxMMTy4EnTpqaoi8Gehnwh8tRuFuka2wINwOTygEmXsYdLr9osUyCCzQRduoiQZ)

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5ceb0836ff03417b9bf7476f40d1e80d&_t=bWiOfRjR0IlDsLHJrHBKqIZADPuqAQ562VR-aSuRDBPQmTVOrZkUu9tzDoooskU1c8eU_Iw4sq_26dcC4QqDRlhIAyULyAHPrI61_F1YzBKLdyNBu_EWmJEah2q4KXrdd8yG9gWfUOzXnVMtsDqKoFNLuhYJLTzH4WY-ZES-oOQ%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5ceb0836ff03417b9bf7476f40d1e80d&_t=bWiOfRjR0IlDsLHJrHBKqIZADPuqAQ562VR-aSuRDBPQmTVOrZkUu9tzDoooskU1c8eU_Iw4sq_26dcC4QqDRo_f1IcLA30e6sg3r2lqmpObjDAXRvduedvFCF7RrjRa).

Peter, here’s the truth: We're facing the fight of our lives next year.
Donald Trump will take office on January 20 with a GOP trifecta and a Supreme Court packed with extremist judges. Our priority is urgent and clear: **We must protect our rights, freedoms, and our way of life here in Minnesota.**
This will require persistence, creativity, and relentless hard work. I’m ready to lead that fight every single day as Governor. But I can’t do it alone.
When our campaign’s fundraising numbers go public shortly after December 31, every pundit and local MAGA Republican will be able to scrutinize our report to see if we’re up for the challenge.
Missing our end-of-year goal would be a tough setback. And with just four days left to go, we still need to raise more than $30,000 to get there.
**[Peter, can you send $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you today to help us make up the difference so we can prove that we’re ready for whatever comes our way next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99298967/519478749/-1127511667?refcode=body&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTJlOWViZS1hMWMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7YQhnhtqJL7MIIuTkcJ-9w4vcK8kEUUC8UkQB-IoNu4=)**

clean_body: Peter, here’s the truth: We're facing the fight of our lives next year. | = Peter, here’s the truth: We're facing the fight of our lives next year. Donald Trump will take office on January 20 with a GOP trifecta and a Supreme Court packed with extremist judges. Our priority is urgent and clear: We must protect our rights, freedoms, and our way of life here in Minnesota. This will require persistence, creativity, and relentless hard work. I’m ready to lead that fight every single day as Governor. But I can’t do it alone. When our campaign’s fundraising numbers go public shortly after December 31, every pundit and local MAGA Republican will be able to scrutinize our report to see if we’re up for the challenge. Missing our end-of-year goal would be a tough setback. Beyond the economic implications, this plan reflects a deep-seated disregard for human dignity. We must stand together to protect the rights of all individuals, regardless of their immigration status. Our nation was built on the principles of diversity and inclusion, and we cannot allow fear-driven policies to undermine these values. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . # [Judges, Terror Charges, & Health Insurance Corps](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153626488&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjI2NDg4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzUyMjkxNDUsImV4cCI6MTczNzgyMTE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NCll3tVtfaoLzzrFTzAIt6EBM_tVr9VQSnKqXpPmCcs)
### The hidden truth about the Judges overseeing cases against citizens charged for terrorism against health insurance corporations
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153626488&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjI2NDg4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNTIyOTE0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzM3ODIxMTQ1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GJfE9PvenASTEUzN6ZHhCbYBnYW1N5fHJHdil1LKPhQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153626488&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjI2NDg4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzUyMjkxNDUsImV4cCI6MTczNzgyMTE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NCll3tVtfaoLzzrFTzAIt6EBM_tVr9VQSnKqXpPmCcs&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153626488&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjI2NDg4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzUyMjkxNDUsImV4cCI6MTczNzgyMTE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NCll3tVtfaoLzzrFTzAIt6EBM_tVr9VQSnKqXpPmCcs)
---
| | [](https://substack..6oeTF4g8CdzCMO-O3Ui-Jr967PpNLzfSmsNOPh8Kfo0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/judges-terror-charges-and-health?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Imagine you were sued by a neighbor, and the judge is your neighbor's spouse? Or, imagine that you were sued by a corporation, and the judge holds financial interests in that corporation's success. Do either of those situations seem fair?
Now imagine you are charged with terrorism, face 15 years to life in prison, possibly the death penalty, and the judge overseeing your case has familial or financial ties to incentivize your conviction. Unfortunately, none of what I am describing is hypothetical, but reflects the current reality of terrorism charges against American citizens. This is an ugly truth corporate media has largely ignored, but if our standard is justice and due process of law, we cannot afford to remain silent.
**Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..T9_XYoeBi_34iC4eZP8Chp7ok9JvK5BGkUBpwBaLPsU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153626488)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b155ca01-ddd4-4d33-a272-0ed8fadeed68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Luigi Mangione (L) Briana Boston (R) have both been charged with terrorism. (Photo Credit: Getty & Polk Co Sheriff's Office)
## Unprecedented Terrorism Charges
I posted the [below comment](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid/note/c-82141743?utm_source=notes-share-action&r=fyvxf) across social media last week and it went viral on multiple platforms, I feel for good reason.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7ccab652-33cf-48f2-9b5c-1107fba51a51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And Luigi Mangione is not alone. Since Mangione's terrorism charge, another American citizen named Briana Boston has also been charged with terrorism. Mangione is in custody awaiting trial while Boston is under house arrest after posting $100,000 bond for the _crime_ of stating "_delay deny depose, you people are next_." I wrote about her case in detail [here](https://substack.com/redirect/ecc33987-a070-45fa-bd10-d84131fe1da6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> A 42-year-old Florida woman named Briana Boston has been arrested and charged on terrorism charges against Blue Cross and Blue Shield health insurance corporation. According to the arrest affidavit, after BCBS denied her health insurance claim, Boston responded, "Delay, deny, depose. You people are next." Apparently, though Boston does not own a firearm, has no violent criminal history, and indicated no acts of violence whatsoever--this statement amounts to a threat of terrorism and mass shooting.
Since these terrorism charges were filed, new information has come to light both about the genesis behind the charges as well as the judges overseeing the charges. This new information forces us to ask--are these citizens receiving due process of law, or have we unjustly ceded power to health insurance corporations?
## Is This Due Process?
Recent reports indicate [that](https://substack.com/redirect/339f66fe-68cb-4b31-a051-cfc1d73323df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_Health insurance industry leaders leaned on the US Department of Justice to prosecute accused UnitedHealthcare CEO assassin Luigi Mangione_." Similarly, it appears that [Blue Cross and Blue Shield contacted the FBI and local law enforcement and pushed for charges](https://substack.com/redirect/86b20864-9667-41a6-8d24-f379a8fe2f18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), ultimately ending up in terrorism charges against Briana Boston. If true, both are stunning examples of elite centibillion dollar corporations flexing their financial muscles to ignite terrorism charges against individuals. But the conflicts are even more direct when we consider the judges overseeing each respective case.
Judges have an ethical obligation to recuse themselves when a conflict of interest exists, even when only an _appearance_ of a conflict exists. For example, The United States Courts Code of Conduct for Judges Canon 2 holds [that](https://substack.com/redirect/50e1f504-6d56-4198-a705-9926fa326d84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "_A Judge Should Avoid Impropriety and the Appearance of Impropriety in all Activities_." It goes on to specify that this standard extends to the mere _appearance_ of impropriety, explaining:
> An appearance of impropriety occurs when reasonable minds, with knowledge of all the relevant circumstances disclosed by a reasonable inquiry, would conclude that the judge's honesty, integrity, impartiality, temperament, or fitness to serve as a judge is impaired. A judge must avoid all impropriety and appearance of impropriety. This prohibition applies to both professional and personal conduct. Because it is not practicable to list all prohibited acts, the prohibition is necessarily cast in general terms that extend to conduct by judges that is harmful although not specifically mentioned in the Code.
Compare this explicit statement obliging judges to avoid even the appearance of impropriety with the ground reality of the judges overseeing Mangione's case and Boston's case, respectively.
## Judge Katharine H. Parker
Judge Katharine H. Parker is currently overseeing Luigi Mangione's case, as Mangione is charged with terrorism for killing a healthcare CEO. As journalist [Ken Klippenstein](https://open.substack.com/users/1980988-ken-klippenstein?utm_source=mentions) astutely [reported earlier this week](https://substack.com/redirect/72a45d8f-14d6-4c12-8d11-48fc0b383a6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Magistrate Judge Katharine H. Parker, who is overseeing pre-trial hearings for Luigi Mangione, is married to a former Pfizer executive and holds hundreds of thousands of dollars in stock, including in healthcare companies and pharmaceutical companies, according to her 2023 financial disclosures. According to Parker's [financial] disclosures, her husband Bret still collects a pension from his time at Pfizer in the form of a Senior Executive Retirement Plan, or SERP.
Judges have required financial disclosures for this very reason--to demonstrate they are not managing cases that could impact their financial well-being. This requirement exemplifies the sensitivity to the mere appearance of impropriety. Asking whether Judge Parker is capable of fairly overseeing Mangione's case is the wrong question. The question worth asking is, does it give the appearance of impropriety that a judge heavily financially invested in the health insurance industry is overseeing a case about terrorism against the health insurance industry? Absolutely. But as Klippenstein also writes in his reporting, "_The judge 's ties to the healthcare business are a stark reminder of how pervasive the for-profit industry is in American life_." Unfortunately, we see a similar case of concerning conflicts with Judge Catherine Combee, who is overseeing Briana Boston's case and terrorism charge.
## Judge Catherine Combee
Judge Catherine Combee is overseeing the terrorism charges against 42-year-old married mother of three Briana Boston. Notably, Boston does not own a firearm, never specified any form of violence, and has no criminal record whatsoever. Still, Judge Combee is proceeding on charges of terrorism against her for her remarks against BlueCrossBlueShield insurance corporation. And as with Mangione, herein lies the appearance of impropriety against Judge Combee. According to her alma mater, [Polk State College](https://substack.com/redirect/b78cec2a-1c3b-41df-ae65-9e51da819077?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
> Combee entered the healthcare field, working her way up through the corporate offices of Laboratory Corporation of America, overseeing quality assurance and scientific affairs, eventually becoming an associate vice president of the S&P 500 company.
Laboratory Corporation of America and BlueCrossBlueShield have extensive financial ties and partnerships that span tens of thousands of cases on a regular basis. And now a former executive for Laboratory Corporation of America is overseeing a terrorism charge against an American citizen, a charge pushed for by executives at BlueCrossBlueShield. Again, asking whether Judge Combee is capable of fairly overseeing Boston's case is the wrong question. The question again worth asking is, per the US Courts Judicial Code of Conduct, is, does it give the appearance of impropriety that a judge heavily tied to the health insurance industry is overseeing a case about terrorism against the health insurance industry? Again, the answer is, absolutely.
This is where the US Courts Judges Code of Conduct is so critical, because it states in clear terms that the standard is not necessarily even a direct conflict, but that, "A judge must avoid all impropriety and _appearance_ of impropriety." It seems obvious both cases pursuing terrorism charges are currently failing to meet this critical standard of due process.
## Conclusion
Let me be explicitly clear. I cite these examples not to intimidate or criticize these judges. I cite these examples to demonstrate the clear appearance of a conflict of interest between these judges, the cases they are overseeing, and the constitutional and sacred requirement of due process of law afforded to every person accused of a crime. As I wrote [the day the UnitedHealth CEO was killed](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid/note/c-80109069?utm_source=notes-share-action&r=fyvxf):
> No, I don't think violently killing CEOs is the answer. I do think it's outrageous and disgusting that 70,000 Americans die preventable deaths annually because health insurance mega corps prioritize profits over healthcare and we don't acknowledge that as violent. Thanks for coming to my TedTalk.
Pay close attention to how these, and perhaps future similar cases, unfold, and whether the courts protect due process of law. To have judges with deep financial, practical, and personal ties to private health insurance corporations now oversee unprecedented cases against Americans accused of terrorism against those same private health insurance corporations exemplifies the massive appearance of impropriety that judges must rise above. However one feels about Luigi Mangione or Briana Boston, _due process of law_ is not mere lip service. It is a constitutionally protected right that we cannot sacrifice for any reason. That is what equal justice under the law mandates of us, and that is what we must demand at every opportunity.
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**

body:
---
| | [_**I just launched my Save Our Health Care survey – and I’ve selected you to be one of the FIRST to share your insights and help devise Democrats’ plan to STOP Donald Trump’s attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act and destroy our health care. I need 25,000 responses to build an accurate sample size with reliable results – will you please take 3 minutes to fill out my survey before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99301150/519484930/-487728681?source=20241226_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhOTgyOC1hM2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swMXKpKde_iGGnEEBwRmpC-9nYG7A9c_xqF5qrpUPo8=&emci=d8c63afd-91c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=624a9828-a3c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) [**FIRST:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99301152/519484933/-487728681?source=20241226_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhOTgyOC1hM2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swMXKpKde_iGGnEEBwRmpC-9nYG7A9c_xqF5qrpUPo8=&emci=d8c63afd-91c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=624a9828-a3c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) Trump tried and failed more than 60 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act – which 50 MILLION Americans rely on for direct coverage and which protects more than 140 MILLION Americans with preexisting conditions. [**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99301154/519484935/-487728681?source=20241226_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhOTgyOC1hM2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swMXKpKde_iGGnEEBwRmpC-9nYG7A9c_xqF5qrpUPo8=&emci=d8c63afd-91c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=624a9828-a3c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) Folks like YOU hosted and attended 10,000 events to help people share their personal stories across the country – and we STOPPED him. [**NOW:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99301155/519484936/-487728681?source=20241226_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhOTgyOC1hM2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swMXKpKde_iGGnEEBwRmpC-9nYG7A9c_xqF5qrpUPo8=&emci=d8c63afd-91c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=624a9828-a3c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219) Democrats need to join together and step up ASAP to BLOCK his plans once again. | Right now, Democrats are organizing to Save Our Health Care – and we’re relying on your insight to help us devise an unbeatable strategy. [_**That’s why I’ve selected you to be one of the first Democrats to complete my survey and share your thoughts. I need 25,000 responses before midnight to ensure reliable results and build a foolproof plan to stop Trump again. Please, I’m counting on your insight more than you could know. Will you submit your feedback before midnight? Here’s what would happen if Republicans get their way on health care:
* 50 million Americans directly covered by the Affordable Care Act would lose health insurance immediately.
* 140 million Americans with pre-existing conditions could be denied coverage.
* Young adults would no longer be able to stay on their family plans until age 26.
* Prescription drug prices would skyrocket.

I’ll be honest.
**[Passing the Affordable Care Act into law was the happiest day of official life.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99301160/519484943/-487728681?source=20241226_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhOTgyOC1hM2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swMXKpKde_iGGnEEBwRmpC-9nYG7A9c_xqF5qrpUPo8=&emci=d8c63afd-91c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=624a9828-a3c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)**
Because I knew it would save lives and make Americans happier and healthier.
[_**With so much at stake, I’m asking you one final time. Together, Democrats STOPPED Trump’s disastrous plans to crush our health care during his first term. We can do it again – but only if grassroots supporters like you step up and share your insight. I need 25,000 responses to build a large enough sample size to ensure accurate results. Will you take 3 minutes to share your feedback and help us Save Our Health Care from Donald Trump and Republicans? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99301161/519484971/-487728681?source=20241226_em_pet_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjRhOTgyOC1hM2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swMXKpKde_iGGnEEBwRmpC-9nYG7A9c_xqF5qrpUPo8=&emci=d8c63afd-91c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=624a9828-a3c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)
I’m looking forward to your response.
Thank you all very much for your well wishes. I am grateful for my care and good health and am honored to keep fighting alongside the American people to Save Our Health Care.

Nancy

name: Voter Action Project Petitions
subject: Time is short to protect journalists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Trump's lawsuits have already started. ABC ( owned by Disney ) chose to settle and pay Trump's foundation $15 million, while Trump just sued the Des Moines Register and legendary pollster Ann Selzer. We cannot waste any time passing this bill!
Sign on now: Demand Congress pass the PRESS Act immediately to protect journalists >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_1&amount=25]
Team,
We know Trump’s constant attacks on the free press won’t stop in his second term. The U.S. House already unanimously passed bipartisan protections for journalists. Now, the Senate must act before Trump is inaugurated.
The PRESS Act would protect journalists and the investigative reporting the public relies on to understand the inner workings of our government. With this legislation, government officials would not be able to force reporters to give up their sources or seize the phone and email records of journalists.
The New York Times Editorial Board said, “ Hostility toward the news media in the polarized politics of the day makes it more urgent than ever to ensure that reporters can continue to pursue their essential role as watchdogs over the government without the threat of court-ordered demands for their sources and information. The PRESS Act is needed now. "
The House passed the PRESS Act without any opposition. The Senate must act now and pass this legislation!
Add your name today: Pass the PRESS Act now to protect the free press! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: Stand with Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: Sign the petition: Bernie - "Democracy is not billionaires buying elections. That's oligarchy."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — in just 3
months, 3 billionaires donated $220 million to Donald Trump. From Elon
Musk to Big Oil executives, billionaires should NOT be able to have this
much influence in our elections.

As Bernie said, “Democracy is not billionaires buying elections. That’s
oligarchy.” The Supreme Court paved the way for this unlimited billionaire
spending — Congress must end it immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20728?t=1011&akid=7433%2E5885482%2E95oeTR ]Stand with Bernie: Congress must overturn Citizens United and get big
money out of politics!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20736?t=1012&akid=7433%2E5885482%2E95oeTR ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20736?t=1013&akid=7433%2E5885482%2E95oeTR ]ADD YOUR NAME

The people can not have true control over our elections if the billionaire
class can spend such massive sums on advertising, lobbying, and supporting
candidates.

Billionaires like Musk, Michael Bloomberg, and Miriam Adelson spent over
$2.5 billion on 2024 elections. Crypto billionaires spent massive sums on
Senate and House races, especially in Ohio to defeat progressive Sherrod
Brown.

“The billionaire class not only controls our economy but our corrupt
political system,” Bernie said.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20736?t=1014&akid=7433%2E5885482%2E95oeTR ][IMG]

It’s time to stand with Bernie and get big money out of our elections and
political process before it’s too late.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20736?t=1015&akid=7433%2E5885482%2E95oeTR ]Add your name: Billionaires like Musk should not be able to buy our
elections. Get big money out of politics and end Citizens United!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20736?t=1016&akid=7433%2E5885482%2E95oeTR ]ADD YOUR NAME

Thank you,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: AMAC Action
subject: We know what’s coming
body:
| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=8f201c68904a468dbb2f648a6c450d28&_e=nKay0ei6K1BS8i0017hr2_UdPmJejgk-9vewsF6mS_E2GSsUvpl4bvi3PBJJ1iKx_n-jd4ld_SMoUZRTqKao12OIoIbDVvGneRKIOxgMtnakxuErKZIX5IGuo-mQ_7KhRFPEWyFY-MZ1LXgHMDLF6YOchicOkbqRKuWSg6uaewpnRlqACbmk89K7e06v08izWJFswduAAwwhKiQ9AZW4if3GPDSug8_stkx7zrsIzxOusbmAf9B9nMOLWsj1gJ81rXsPypG_t_RjoE5IHdtWGCGDFDteLomDaeN-Jicytxey-Z4tletvOYi09HDd_aIT5bSIoJPCxhpsKAwo96fK8HaU_eExrdB9yOWSwqlDruofK3AKhJjy02YMhi_QWOYDNplz8lLQN81t6852_KI_7RnP3hL_9bvzc5OIJlMF0I0%3D)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Donald Trump hit the ground running after Election Day and has already announced a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are already working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks - **Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense**._** **_ _**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=8f201c68904a468dbb2f648a6c450d28&_e=nKay0ei6K1BS8i0017hr2_UdPmJejgk-9vewsF6mS_E2GSsUvpl4bvi3PBJJ1iKx_n-jd4ld_SMoUZRTqKao12OIoIbDVvGneRKIOxgMtnakxuErKZIX5IGuo-mQ_7KhRFPEWyFY-MZ1LXgHMDLF6YOchicOkbqRKuWSg6uaewpnRlqACbmk89K7e06v08izWJFswduAAwwhKiQ9AZW4if3GPDSug8_stkx7zrsIzxOusbmAf9B9nMOLWsj1gJ81NAIujKpVpFWjSW7fTk82OSJx4lHoVwmWlL3vGGFHBGZGCixNF2nwGGsCh4k0CVAVAJQYYf2nSuRPC6g4ZO64_Quv_Pc20virK3z9jAfAKvjpFAFumCuYsf9mgFmEoK7Rjy5UyAgrROb_xBrIYU9Bwsqx0Y6GpqsfCkn78wxZorA%3D)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military--something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin's watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars ' worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That's why he's nominated Pete Hegseth--a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests. But we know what's coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. _And now the lying and corrupt mainstream media has jumped in with malicious and specious hit pieces, trying to malign Hegseth as a villain_. If we don't stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can't let that happen. body:
Your feedback is critical to our work

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99304047/519492955/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTg1ZmRlOTUtYTljMy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k9p6GEVYG17GT__gokMf35tlw7nQDXjycVwWm6aVWfA=&emci=95355e8f-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=585fde95-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)
Peter –
The 2024 Election made one thing clear: the right’s domination of the media—on TV, online, and on the radio—delivered Donald Trump the presidency.
>From Fox News to the proliferation of lies and conspiracies on platforms like TikTok, the right held a full-blown monopoly on the election narrative.
We need a progressive media alternative to change this destructive dynamic.
[**COURIER is working to build that network—but we need your help to craft our strategy. We’re asking supporters like you to share your experiences in our 2024 Election Debrief Survey. Do you have five minutes to give us your feedback?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99304048/519492956/1446928366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTg1ZmRlOTUtYTljMy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k9p6GEVYG17GT__gokMf35tlw7nQDXjycVwWm6aVWfA=&emci=95355e8f-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=585fde95-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)
**[Give your feedback now ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99304050/519492958/1446928366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTg1ZmRlOTUtYTljMy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k9p6GEVYG17GT__gokMf35tlw7nQDXjycVwWm6aVWfA=&emci=95355e8f-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=585fde95-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)**
Over decades, Republicans have built a massive media empire. It’s not just Fox News. Outlets like the Epoch Times and Newsmax, along with influencers like Tucker Carlson and Benny Johnson, have gained huge followings. And with Elon Musk tipping the scales at X, social media platforms keep pushing conservative conspiracies to the top, shaping the national conversation.
**Meanwhile, legacy media is utterly failing to fight back.**
The tired “both sides” approach to reporting allows Trump’s misinformation to dominate. Worse, outlets like _The Washington Post_ and ABC News are caving to his pressure—bowing to lawsuits as he expands threats to the free press.
At COURIER, we’re working to fundamentally change all of this—and that’s why your feedback is so important. Your insights will help us shape our strategy in 2025 and beyond.
[**Please take a moment to tell us how you got your news during the 2024 Election—and what you think can be done to fix our broken media landscape and safeguard our democracy from right-wing lies.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99304051/519492960/1446928366?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTg1ZmRlOTUtYTljMy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k9p6GEVYG17GT__gokMf35tlw7nQDXjycVwWm6aVWfA=&emci=95355e8f-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=585fde95-a9c3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)

clean_body: Your feedback is critical to our work Peter – The 2024 Election made one thing clear: the right’s domination of the media—on TV, online, and on the radio—delivered Donald Trump the presidency. From Fox News to the proliferation of lies and conspiracies on platforms like TikTok, the right held a full-blown monopoly on the election narrative. We need a progressive media alternative to change this destructive dynamic. Over decades, Republicans have built a massive media empire. It’s not just Fox News. Outlets like the Epoch Times and Newsmax, along with influencers like Tucker Carlson and Benny Johnson, have gained huge followings. And with Elon Musk tipping the scales at X, social media platforms keep pushing conservative conspiracies to the top, shaping the national conversation. Meanwhile, legacy media is utterly failing to fight back. The tired “both sides” approach to reporting allows Trump’s misinformation to dominate. Worse, outlets like The Washington Post and ABC News are caving to his pressure—bowing to lawsuits as he expands threats to the free press. At COURIER, we’re working to fundamentally change all of this—and that’s why your feedback is so important. Your insights will help us shape our strategy in 2025 and beyond. Your feedback is critical to supporting our mission. Thank you for your time, COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Team Benson
subject: How we’ll make sure government will work for all
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
This is what we’re focused on.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=12%2E181023%2EfGYc8b)
Team,
Here on Team Benson, we’re focused on addressing the concerns of _**everyone**_ in the state of Michigan, and making sure our government works for all. Secretary Benson is crisscrossing the state to hold impactful community conversations with Michiganders, and that project will only continue.
_**“I look forward to continuing these conversations in the New Year. We have a lot of work ahead of us. But I'm not giving up — and neither should you.”** — Jocelyn Benson_
To continue that work in 2025, we need your help. This movement is powered by folks giving $3 here and $30 there so we can make stops in every part of the state and build a framework for a path ahead. That’s why we’re asking:
**[Before the end-of-year deadline next week, will you chip in whatever feels right — even just $3 — to keep powering Secretary Benson’s work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20241226-1?refcode=em20241226-1&refcode2=12_181023_fGYc8b&akid=12%2E181023%2EfGYc8b)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20241226-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241226-1&refcode2=12_181023_fGYc8b&akid=12%2E181023%2EfGYc8b)**
Thank you for all you do,
Team Benson

name: Trump Knife Set
subject: Own a Piece of American History – Trump Knife Collection Awaits!
body:
Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)
---
| | |
---
_December 26th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
Dear Reader, Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history. The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship. Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.
---
| | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)
---
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.
* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)
---
**A Showcase of Elegance: The LED Display Case** The collection comes complete with a **[custom-designed wooden display case](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)** , made from premium cherry wood and featuring a shining gold strip with a hinged glass cover. The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.
* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)
---
**An Heirloom for Generations** This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience. Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations. **What Our Collectors Are Saying:**
* **“The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer**
* **“I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer**

**Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors** The **Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection** is available for a short time. With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete. This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history. **[CLICK HERE TO CHECK AVAILABILITY AND ORDER YOUR SET](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)** Sincerely,
TrumpKnifeSet.com P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.
---
|
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19484/6374453/58caff0867e81a078e91bff1199cf17bc307f512/71ea16e7fc009ac3d8f848e4fad2614b6277ecbf)
---
|
---

# ANNOUNCEMENT FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP:

## **_I have a big announcement to share with Peter!_**

Your support helped me win the election, and now I’ve officially assembled my cabinet.
With Inauguration day right around the corner, I would like to thank you for everything by appointing you as an **_Official Cabinet-Level Advisor._**

### **Will you please accept this honorable position?**

[ACCEPT POSITION](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=8318c3805f8445a991fd5daab64db507&_e=B5YR2uI4hyRdgrgMgJdUQixMPCy32I89uF-Hrqi--_X_DvvE5h0lTBcMYZjoa7nYPbg3-iYryMHI1zmGSGEXzRLpkvHL-ALMqES1PKinq53MJJAfd9rUd_5-CKOLMtb9YKHwB_z1XEZA-OtIfx71TeMNBprSgpjB6BQB-1xpdOxtxQye3dxiw-LDqF1Z6vQnQyewpVnEQ2yHHzZZW84eSC0LcIm1WmaH9pJtC11RuAGMjyGPgZIesAswWyXN1JHIPcB1zPcROCi5ZjC6VyeTna1LWEV8FdvK3XkR3TkAh5f3JcStrl-esAEbodRRZMbHuH0v1jl5ZD3SkE8eh6txNAWP5eNsQFDtknyfNF8ZPklGrg0SULavnWkvV2_WWkPCrTtmO8mhE086aZXrahWtbw%3D%3D)
As my Official Cabinet-Level Advisor, YOU will play a key role in shaping my priorities.
**_[Speaking of that, I need your advice right now, so please take a moment to answer a few easy questions.>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=8318c3805f8445a991fd5daab64db507&_e=B5YR2uI4hyRdgrgMgJdUQixMPCy32I89uF-Hrqi--_X_DvvE5h0lTBcMYZjoa7nYPbg3-iYryMHI1zmGSGEXzRLpkvHL-ALMqES1PKinq53MJJAfd9rUd_5-CKOLMtb9YKHwB_z1XEZA-OtIfx71TeMNBprSgpjB6BQB-1xpdOxtxQye3dxiw-LDqF1Z6vQnQyewpVnEQ2yHHzZZW84eSC0LcIm1WmaH9pJtC11RuAGMjyGPgZIesAswWyXN1JHIFh4hGFiInlEQKWOJ0jBZ7yMJA1jgzS-ddi8VHFGIBojiaTNVkpKOTQ-cm8CA81a2Y7Yrw7UQ54T-Wa-tM3fwbKj8q1kokfH_LyNtz-eQezbFsuMnoDsnaeiXY5A88wpOFmdP4CIfiJZinPT35uOcFg%3D%3D)_**
I know I can always count on you.

[ADVISE TRUMP](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=8318c3805f8445a991fd5daab64db507&_e=B5YR2uI4hyRdgrgMgJdUQixMPCy32I89uF-Hrqi--_X_DvvE5h0lTBcMYZjoa7nYPbg3-iYryMHI1zmGSGEXzRLpkvHL-ALMqES1PKinq53MJJAfd9rUd_5-CKOLMtb9YKHwB_z1XEZA-OtIfx71TeMNBprSgpjB6BQB-1xpdOxtxQye3dxiw-LDqF1Z6vQnQyewpVnEQ2yHHzZZW84eSC0LcIm1WmaH9pJtC11RuAGMjyGPgZIesAswWyXN1JHIgSLtsEdtP_a6m-Nm5QUQ_LaedolE5olgDfiCHglC4-BRhJ0TdBJcyQXsSk4vZm95ZfLK-x4qVj0GWvoKl-yIexljLmMJUt1XMK-72ox7vhY1kf04IbV4QA5y964IX6GLDFynLV4dH_ZXCci4ii89bQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

The effort to tank Pete Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.

Pete is going to get his hearing before the Senate Armed Services Committee, not a sham hearing before the American media.

**[And before he does, I'm calling on ALL PATRIOTIC AMERICANS to rush to his defense and fill up our Official Letter of Support with MILLIONS of signatures. >>](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=c6cff4591c56404f844bf10d8f018faf&_e=fGJ09QZdFs1WCwjiuixn2M6Pj3_dyq2V9ueeHslZrzIuM5d3mxZloRqtCUgUSTlj8yOpeMPdNjUg-yVHucD6UHkLI9-ePL6VQ4iUs0bZQYvZdP4Zp_oEpqI2YHypnn8FH-EB-47-giQEILLfSNI24Qs4VGnQWXP3HlhXw7dBfQj9W_85fTfphps89K4BVvpPapLXdDwetX38Ag6uCtu1HMn5g57OOhICuZi4qMnsDitVTRtbGC39oywghe5hM0IdcWz91TyCb5Ml0r6Sl2SbkbL4_ancNDrDkVWekg3xWybXk0Siyc6-7wv0fNLAITnr7H3C-ZQ_omiDDfzhTLGxoLtOsf3W9v5TJ6olGJ7Mzsej38F4rXlgN7x4z6nZeA0kLskE-zE8_LDcFM51FUN9zyQuo3ahyJxTcTr_tbt6vGjlcb9L49wvh-rnjNaOnXZrazFkA7VF9s-nAKKgEmsobiDWoz8uj2wfUTHycQbxO63tBkyWNqBhDoNo1WsCk5N68Hg-lh4Dqco5bcXoL_z1Aje7PbcrbylW5JJu3Yts_gQ%3D)

They can't go after President Trump and me. We already beat them in a landslide!

That's why they've focused their efforts on attacking a proud veteran like Pete Hegseth.

Pete will dismantle their DEI agenda, eradicate wokeism, and build our military back into a fighting machine - _**and that TERRIFIES them.**_

Friend, Patrick here. As Wes’ finance director, my job is to ensure the campaign is on pace to reach our fundraising goals and have the funds we need to sustain our work. [**Today, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to Wes.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99306986/519502035/1942360061?refcode=em20241226-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTI2MzU3Ny1hZGMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9W1DAl0Gt-i41XDgBfAAMw_KE9BD94d2HkTAOceBhs0=) But before I do, let me tell you why our monthly goals are so important. Every donation goes a long way to supporting Wes’s work, and they add up quickly. Setting monthly goals and tracking our progress allows us to better understand where we are and prepare our budget. The more fundraising we can bring in month by month, the more it allows us to plan ahead, like for the upcoming fundraising freeze in January. That’s why for December, we’re going to set an ambitious goal of raising $20,000 by December 31. As one of our most active supporters, I have to ask: [**Can you make your first contribution right now? Every donation is critical for our team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99306987/519502036/1942360061?refcode=em20241226-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTI2MzU3Ny1hZGMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9W1DAl0Gt-i41XDgBfAAMw_KE9BD94d2HkTAOceBhs0=) | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99306988/519502037/1942360061?refcode=em20241226-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTI2MzU3Ny1hZGMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9W1DAl0Gt-i41XDgBfAAMw_KE9BD94d2HkTAOceBhs0=)**

clean_body: Friend, Patrick here. As Wes’ finance director, my job is to ensure the campaign is on pace to reach our fundraising goals and have the funds we need to sustain our work. = But before I do, let me tell you why our monthly goals are so important. Every donation goes a long way to supporting Wes’s work, and they add up quickly. Setting monthly goals and tracking our progress allows us to better understand where we are and prepare our budget. The more fundraising we can bring in month by month, the more it allows us to plan ahead, like for the upcoming fundraising freeze in January. That’s why for December, we’re going to set an ambitious goal of raising $20,000 by December 31. As one of our most active supporters, I have to ask: = | = Thank you, Patrick
