name: Lila Rose
subject: Defund Planned Parenthood Petition
body:
Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=21368f8a3a9a495787425ccbbfcfb1fc&_t=GI9_VnVVFsGEZlAUcAMwJmtJBQAU9gxjktQ1VJKr-ZALUtDTGB1Y3oHCrR-51iRhcYIiDct4oNrmi9RMn2ep-CJcpx6x7D0SA_LwMDSLYBfkBabBMNBtsPq2KPRM-RWG)_
---
[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=21368f8a3a9a495787425ccbbfcfb1fc&_e=Xm8XTtzaw8GUnx5oY8eKATjZY_WwNci3Uirj35SkSYlvQYpUgjKdBbQkkdx4YPYQrjWz-BQPuDvbJkf0pVcNwosx2EB5cGzNJ1OeOEUf_VpiQHl8YCRFTU77RfhRu2NMyJLtCFyOKX93GR3mRxypknUAI872oAE7PTybxNc5_wF4cFJIqwbKJ5rng8KNEolLVYam71T5lGT-zu799F1mXAX29sVsqRzhpttQveK2m-SzY987o5jDSD0RZkkkp5MWQdYpGl-LYKk6wmRwVlRQ9tWUA0yX1_J6_k_IkooHXykXevd4W3llNdpT6hpEk7-AB3K3GzdDnHFicteNditNZRpLdp31EYffw4ADWZwUloJsWPVJJ6ny3lOq4-5bbUyuMo66VcfEWqU87js4izbfXQ%3D%3D)
#
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=21368f8a3a9a495787425ccbbfcfb1fc&_e=Xm8XTtzaw8GUnx5oY8eKATjZY_WwNci3Uirj35SkSYlvQYpUgjKdBbQkkdx4YPYQrjWz-BQPuDvbJkf0pVcNwosx2EB5cGzNJ1OeOEUf_VpiQHl8YCRFTU77RfhRu2NMyJLtCFyOKX93GR3mRxypknUAI872oAE7PTybxNc5_wF4cFJIqwbKJ5rng8KNEolLVYam71T5lGT-zu799F1mXAX29sVsqRzhpttQveK2m-ReHExqiPfEcGLRtenurzvTd4wV2v324U48VOwjXHta9r1JAsC9sRW1SUVdRLdVKCrAlBoo4mKd7mp3TvFahp1a-UE4uAowfSVyNZPqYV2_l4TOs38ApA2xxQjl9F4nwBM62upBd802tYL2jqLQaajkji6T9Zg-hz-q4tuCRMWfUw%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=21368f8a3a9a495787425ccbbfcfb1fc&_e=Xm8XTtzaw8GUnx5oY8eKATjZY_WwNci3Uirj35SkSYlvQYpUgjKdBbQkkdx4YPYQrjWz-BQPuDvbJkf0pVcNwosx2EB5cGzNJ1OeOEUf_VpiQHl8YCRFTU77RfhRu2NMyJLtCFyOKX93GR3mRxypknUAI872oAE7PTybxNc5_wF4cFJIqwbKJ5rng8KNEolLVYam71T5lGT-zu799F1mXAX29sVsqRzhpttQveK2m-T1xg9dHYOvm0bYSIoyi2xmCrzre_FKACRJvCJug33llVg8-LEnFZO4UVuHBQ-ZHpK9iIqNs64vc4gBjPABMx498DzL8WUl5K3Be-SaqFIiSkkAjlnsX6-bo0Y1pexJzQxfQCJL2UJ-jiU1NX1EYLuvls33tP3FaGRJTsz2ybXbkA%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Your Money
subject: The Dollar's Days Are Numbered – Is Your Money Safe?
body:
For decades, America could keep rogue states in check by freezing
| | | |
---
| | | For decades, America could keep rogue states in check by freezing their dirty money and locking them out of global trade. But now, China's new 'digital' currency could finally dethrone the dollar... By letting them move BILLIONS in secret, completely outside America's control. Russia, Iran, and North Korea have all joined the crusade to destroy the dollar, and together... **Which now means that:**
* Iran can freely fund terrorist attacks on American soil using money we can't trace or stop...
* North Korea can build MORE nuclear missiles aimed at American cities...
* Russia can bankroll cyber-attacks on our power grid and water supply...
* PLUS: Communist China can strangle our food supply by buying up even more American farmland.

When all is said and done... [This final attack on the dollar is putting your IRA and 401K savings at risk.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19489/6374453/37303504bd0d8130c68a14875e0bb4b1f0f89cdb/355e232f9e5866bff36a78848fc5e0deed42a0db) But President Trump saw this attack coming... Which is why Trump's IRS is handing out a little-known "IRS Loophole" to help America First patriots like YOU fight back. He told Annie Andrews, one of our founders, that he shifted from content about charity work to politics because he viewed politics as another form of charity work where he could help millions of people alienated by Republican policies.

As Knowa told Annie, Republican policies that may not appear harmful to us end up affecting people across the country in ways we don’t even realize. These policies affect working families and their children, and it’s up to us to speak up against them to fight for what is right.

Join Knowa and our team here at Their Future PAC in protecting those harmed by Republican policies. **[Can you chip in $5 today so we can help elect leaders who will fight for kids like Knowa in Congress? body:
Sign Trump’s “Happy New Year” card >>

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl5fesbv7jn02gl2dpf4bdr3kn0mo0lhdd0s38e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9imcp32c1h2bs)

_2025 will be a YEAR to remember since we will have PRESIDENT TRUMP back in the Oval Office!_ 🎉 🎉 🎉

We want to wish President Trump a VERY HAPPY NEW YEAR and many more to come, so we made a special **["Happy New Year" Card](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs0bf0ivrpd45edjdrvjqba32k1678f7dradnth8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9imcp32c1h2bs)** for the President-elect, and there is ONE SPOT LEFT for your signature!!!

**[Add your John Hancock to President Trump's "Happy New Year" Card to wish the President-elect a VERY Happy New Year from his TOP supporter.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl65165i6u49k42sc42mndfrh81bt9atkdq2k2ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9imcp32c1h2bs)**

**[ADD YOUR NAME TO THE CARD NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhcma466o6ug1e9tc7gv9v2jt79ge5tni65blqf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9imcp32c1h2bs)**
Friend, this new year will be FULL of blessings, and President Trump is one of them! _Before the ball drops on NYE, will you help us make sure he knows how ECSTATIC we are to have him back in the White House again?_

**[Sign the special"Happy New Year" card for President Trump to wish him and his family well in 2025 and the years to come!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh9hl4q16hmd0lq50svkrdi0fqnffc7pfhoih8oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c9imcp32c1h2bs)**

Team America

name: Elect Republicans HQ
subject: Can You Afford to Let Democrats Win This Seat and Jeopardize Trump's Agenda?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The latest election results have shown us just how narrow our majority is - with only 220 House seats to the Democrats' 215, every single seat counts.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The difference heaven makes today
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Hello Friend,

Imagine you're planning a move to a new country-a faraway place
you've never visited before. Wouldn't you want to know everything
you could about it-what the culture is like, the language, the
climate, and most importantly, how to get there? It would make a
huge difference in how you prepare for the journey!

As Christians, we know that one day we will leave this world
and be united with God in heaven. But surprisingly, many of us
know very little about what awaits us in that incredible place.

In my book A Place Called Heaven, I dive into Scripture to
answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, including:

Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind?

Will we know our loved ones when we get there?

Do people in heaven know what's happening on earth?

What difference does a future heaven make in our lives
today?

I know many of us have asked these questions at some point.
Understanding what the Bible says about our eternal home doesn't
just satisfy our curiosity-it transforms how we live today. By
shifting our focus from the temporary struggles of this life to
the eternal glory that awaits us, we can live with greater hope,
purpose, and peace.

To thank you for your generous gift to Pathway to Victory
today, I'd love to send you a copy of A Place Called Heaven,
https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1

I hope this book will give you a clearer picture of the future
God has prepared for you and help you live each day with eternity
in mind.

Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the
gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus
Christ.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - For your gift of $75 or more, we'll send you A Place
Called Heaven, the beautiful gift book Encouragement from A Place
Called Heaven, our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion
message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of
this spiritually uplifting bundle:
https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-large-kit-1

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: Empty promises
body:
We won’t be tricked by any empty promises or political stunts. | | | | | **"Trump says he supports DACA recipients. His past actions say differently."**
_— Vox, December 2024_
* * *
**In a recent _Meet the Press_ interview, President-elect Donald Trump claimed he’s open to working with Democrats on legislation that could keep DACA recipients in the country. His own track record, however, casts doubt on just how serious this commitment is.**
---
Peter,
Trump’s attacks on DACA are nothing new, and we won’t be tricked by any empty promises or political stunts. DACA recipients — and all immigrant youth — need a clear and permanent pathway to citizenship, not fear, uncertainty, or exploitation.
Let’s be clear: DACA recipients like myself contribute so much to our communities, our economy, and our future. Yet Trump and his allies are doubling down on cruel immigration policies to strip away their rights and livelihoods.
_We won’t stand for it._ We’re ready to fight for immigrant youth, our families, and our future. We’ve been here before, and we’re not backing down now.
DACA recipients are counting on us to protect them and their futures in the only country they’ve ever called home. That’s why we’ll keep organizing, advocating, and holding the Trump administration accountable at every turn.
But to do that, we need your support. Every dollar you pitch in will go toward mobilizing communities, advocating for DACA recipients, and building a movement strong enough to fight back.
**[Will you chip in any amount today to support our work and stand up for DACA recipients and immigrant youth?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplr7qTwFZnUk6gQ-gJPnrV272Wz0qQcYdIQVWJP81vIxCgXVWgQWWUn9zasCOyHz41UGCE8ktWaUXPPYmPqJx-QkxKC2yl3TGRmxJW5zpJwzxupvtGu4WmdYNaXi5e4Dj57u5LqypuTbVJECpb-CYG4fYwnPVrXts6U9qoJnzD6bFgu0X8R8scVvHxgP3cjXzqif66pGczdle4fC40yhOFvt-DFBHhovUHVA-rqHQNjPszj70e9Otc9J85SCBes3GcX4Hz7QRcYQTB7-WfGVN0wgrUCCnFbw2juQa_4MtWLjMPsJTXeySF-FwUt_tfeOyyVqO3Zzx0EVJRlbWunlcOCug/4cm/qnrK6-xTSQyVKS43mLU9Gg/h0/h001.KvtE7w8k1d8ErnKlcdXHfC6wcLsCccIyZ9vXVyPvRw8)**

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

clean_body: It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. And we need you to join us. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Peter In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

| |
Dear Friend,

Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month's election?

Some of these so-called elite institutions canceled classes and gave students coloring books, hot cocoa, and counseling so they could cope with the election results.

Could there be better proof that too many of America's schools fail to prepare their students to be responsible citizens of the world's greatest and longest-lasting constitutional republic?

Yet, we should not really be surprised by this. After all, the forces of the anti-American Left have been focused on seizing control of our educational institutions since the late 1960s.

Too many young Americans are taught that our nation's founding principles were developed to promote white supremacy, that natural rights and private property are codewords for fascism, and that justice requires the destruction of capitalism.

To normal, hard-working Americans, this sounds insane. That's because it _is_ insane.

Our American way of life is under relentless attack on campuses across the country. This problem won't be fixed quickly or easily--although I believe we have the opportunity to score significant victories in the coming year.

I am hopeful for our future, and one of the main reasons I am hopeful is the sense of civic responsibility and generosity of people like **YOU**.

With your support, Hillsdale College plans to redouble its efforts in 2025 to revive and preserve liberty through education.

**[Given the urgency of engaging the Left on the battleground of education, will you consider a tax-deductible gift today to help Hillsdale College expand its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f8fe475175324dbb89d862144639a08f&_e=ttBuOyxldQfZoH2DDp0Yr94w-dZ7n321DUVvJADzOebBvSjxgpa_tq2K-968hX5fg5IVLdTuxuERAeCYAbKU2_MfytExk7dWbf6xH1Fq_eheutlLXA37m9P67B82hziw5Cn-W9izaj95pOPPVFUH_eVIwv9VyvbVi93dPdWmdVqWmz9JnwSti6U8sVWF5ezXuJ3R3znd_IG6jg9W_fCk1r3VhbINBUG9w2cRMT2wI-SAJogi2EBk2RrS3nkfDtGWVT_ObEtrFRjRnEWTqBXbNwbMTyGFt8ES2E8Xry8EGw1CUWwkswFTkIABLaHEqavV8wtIiGofCmab1SnCAhJO43D0Y6JuLYn3S_D3MmuGBijoeT92Gq6Q9a6BxlpT68CN)**

You will help us to expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of _Imprimis_ , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Stepping up the battle to retake American education from the anti-American Left is an essential part of restoring and preserving the American way of life. It will take a mighty effort--but in the words of Hillsdale's motto, "Strength Rejoices in the Challenge."

Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us to reach and teach additional millions of our fellow citizens.

**As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **

This allows Hillsdale to remain **genuinely independent** and focused on its mission, free of burdensome and corrupting federal regulations.

But it also means that all our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--**is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

2025 will be a critical year, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our government and on our schools.

It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course on "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of **$25** or **$50** , while others give gifts of **$100** , **$500** , or even more. What's most important is that you give what you can.

Please help today by making your best tax-deductible, year-end gift using the secure, convenient link below:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f8fe475175324dbb89d862144639a08f&_e=ttBuOyxldQfZoH2DDp0Yr94w-dZ7n321DUVvJADzOebBvSjxgpa_tq2K-968hX5fg5IVLdTuxuERAeCYAbKU2_MfytExk7dWbf6xH1Fq_eheutlLXA37m9P67B82hziw5Cn-W9izaj95pOPPVFUH_eVIwv9VyvbVi93dPdWmdVqWmz9JnwSti6U8sVWF5ezXuJ3R3znd_IG6jg9W_fCk1r3VhbINBUG9w2cRMT2wI-T_yWeU8pMgj4poxugtgCYWnOb5n7KU6N7Wb7ptb8afkwxNKcTKglG45Y_fRy-BUSo0WvHTyQCVv1g32WFBWXA4OFhqFGrSCGYWEVz8Q0HmBlTYDDR_jqFGGmjyWYPhe6guTJQr2gGrihNhRmYJno9t)

Thank you for your partnership in our educational efforts to preserve liberty and the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

clean_body: Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month’s election? | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | Dear Friend, Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month's election? Some of these so-called elite institutions canceled classes and gave students coloring books, hot cocoa, and counseling so they could cope with the election results. Could there be better proof that too many of America's schools fail to prepare their students to be responsible citizens of the world's greatest and longest-lasting constitutional republic? Yet, we should not really be surprised by this. After all, the forces of the anti-American Left have been focused on seizing control of our educational institutions since the late 1960s. Too many young Americans are taught that our nation's founding principles were developed to promote white supremacy, that natural rights and private property are codewords for fascism, and that justice requires the destruction of capitalism. To normal, hard-working Americans, this sounds insane. That's because it is insane. Our American way of life is under relentless attack on campuses across the country. This problem won't be fixed quickly or easily--although I believe we have the opportunity to score significant victories in the coming year. I am hopeful for our future, and one of the main reasons I am hopeful is the sense of civic responsibility and generosity of people like YOU. With your support, Hillsdale College plans to redouble its efforts in 2025 to revive and preserve liberty through education. You will help us to expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of Imprimis , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Stepping up the battle to retake American education from the anti-American Left is an essential part of restoring and preserving the American way of life. It will take a mighty effort--but in the words of Hillsdale's motto, "Strength Rejoices in the Challenge." Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us to reach and teach additional millions of our fellow citizens. As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This allows Hillsdale to remain genuinely independent and focused on its mission, free of burdensome and corrupting federal regulations. But it also means that all our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. 2025 will be a critical year, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our government and on our schools. It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course on "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts. Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of $25 or $50 , while others give gifts of $100 , $500 , or even more. What's most important is that you give what you can. Please help today by making your best tax-deductible, year-end gift using the secure, convenient link below: Thank you for your partnership in our educational efforts to preserve liberty and the American way of life. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 .

subject: Bumping your exclusive survey invite!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible
body:
Please respond before it’s too late
| | |
---
Hi, friend, sorry to email you again during such a busy time of year, but this is important. You were personally selected to participate in our **_[2025 Strategy Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312189/519518335/-750212040?code=jtk3043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiNjI0OS1iY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbOWU1Y0TcHYi7UtKRe6VTpt7T9e30VYsDq0biU-4Ww=&emci=3a33b67b-87bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=efdb6249-bcc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)_ , **but it looks like we’re still missing your response.
We’ve only invited a small group of top supporters to participate, so we really need every single person to join or our results won’t be accurate. **_[I just reactivated your invitation, so please, take a moment to share your thoughts before it expires at midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312190/519518336/-750212040?code=jtk3043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiNjI0OS1iY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbOWU1Y0TcHYi7UtKRe6VTpt7T9e30VYsDq0biU-4Ww=&emci=3a33b67b-87bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=efdb6249-bcc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)_**
Thanks in advance.

– Katie
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jeanne Shaheen**
Date: Mon, Dec 23, 2024
Subject: Moving forward after this year’s elections
| |
---
Friend, there’s no easy way to say this. 2024 was an incredibly tough year for Democrats, and next year promises to be even more challenging.
In January, Donald Trump and Republicans will take control of the White House and Congress, and we will have to do what we can to make progress wherever possible, stop them from rolling back our fundamental rights and protect the future of our democracy.
It won’t be easy, but together, we can be a check on Donald Trump and his allies and fight for the future Americans deserve. I’m ready to put in the work, but I need you with me, friend. [**That’s why I’m asking you to share your thoughts in my 60-second focus group today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312191/519518337/-750212040?code=jtk3043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiNjI0OS1iY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbOWU1Y0TcHYi7UtKRe6VTpt7T9e30VYsDq0biU-4Ww=&emci=3a33b67b-87bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=efdb6249-bcc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)
| | [JOIN THE FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312192/519518338/-750212040?code=jtk3043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiNjI0OS1iY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbOWU1Y0TcHYi7UtKRe6VTpt7T9e30VYsDq0biU-4Ww=&emci=3a33b67b-87bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=efdb6249-bcc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)
---
I know that, when times get tough, it can be tempting to bury our heads in the sand or go down a TikTok rabbit hole and try to block it all out. That’s exactly what Trump and his cronies are hoping we’ll do.
Instead, we need to do the opposite and be _more engaged than ever._ They need to know that we’re far from backing down, ready to fight harder than ever to defend our rights and take back control of our government in 2026.
[**Staying in communication and aligning our priorities is a big part of that, which is why I’m asking you to complete my focus group before midnight tonight. As one of my most engaged supporters, I’m counting on you to weigh in and help inform our strategies for 2025.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312193/519518339/-750212040?code=jtk3043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmRiNjI0OS1iY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbOWU1Y0TcHYi7UtKRe6VTpt7T9e30VYsDq0biU-4Ww=&emci=3a33b67b-87bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=efdb6249-bcc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)

clean_body: Please respond before it’s too late | | | Hi, friend, sorry to email you again during such a busy time of year, but this is important. You were personally selected to participate in our , but it looks like we’re still missing your response. We’ve only invited a small group of top supporters to participate, so we really need every single person to join or our results won’t be accurate. Thanks in advance. – Katie \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Jeanne Shaheen Date: Mon, Dec 23, 2024 Subject: Moving forward after this year’s elections | | Friend, there’s no easy way to say this. 2024 was an incredibly tough year for Democrats, and next year promises to be even more challenging. In January, Donald Trump and Republicans will take control of the White House and Congress, and we will have to do what we can to make progress wherever possible, stop them from rolling back our fundamental rights and protect the future of our democracy. It won’t be easy, but together, we can be a check on Donald Trump and his allies and fight for the future Americans deserve. I’m ready to put in the work, but I need you with me, friend. | | I know that, when times get tough, it can be tempting to bury our heads in the sand or go down a TikTok rabbit hole and try to block it all out. That’s exactly what Trump and his cronies are hoping we’ll do. Instead, we need to do the opposite and be more engaged than ever. They need to know that we’re far from backing down, ready to fight harder than ever to defend our rights and take back control of our government in 2026. | | Thank you, Jeanne | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To keep up with the latest, follow us on , and . Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible. Shaheen for Senate P.O. Box 869 Manchester, NH 03105 United States |

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Dangerous ruling that could get much worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_2&amount=25]
Folks,
There are many consequences of this past election, but this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
Whether the nomination for former Florida AG Pam Bondi goes through for Attorney General or we get stuck with another anti-voting MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122624_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_2&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122624_2&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122624_2&amount=25]

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: my top priority
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312438/519519078/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWU0MDc2YS1iZGMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4G-2jBGZRSuT6UkrcNrdQZc3AFYtHYLo8DD5Oe1d-Yg=) Since I was elected to Congress, I’ve been focused on protecting our freedoms when they come under attack — and I have no intention of stopping now. I’m standing up for everyone’s freedom to make their own decisions about whether, when, and how to start a family. I’m standing up for the freedom to make decisions about our own bodies, including the right to access abortion care. I’m standing up for the freedom to marry who we love — and to live openly as who we are, free from discrimination or violence. And I’m committed to protecting the freedom to participate in our democracy — one where we respect the results of free and fair elections and refuse to let conspiracy theorists undermine the will of the people. [_**But to safeguard these freedoms, I can’t do it alone. We’ve got some tough fights ahead, and I need you with me. As we head into this new year, can you help us hit the ground running by pitching in to this movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312439/519519079/-1905085255?refcode=email_122624_priority&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWU0MDc2YS1iZGMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4G-2jBGZRSuT6UkrcNrdQZc3AFYtHYLo8DD5Oe1d-Yg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312440/519519080/-1905085255?refcode=email_122624_priority&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWU0MDc2YS1iZGMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4G-2jBGZRSuT6UkrcNrdQZc3AFYtHYLo8DD5Oe1d-Yg=)

clean_body: = Since I was elected to Congress, I’ve been focused on protecting our freedoms when they come under attack — and I have no intention of stopping now. I’m standing up for everyone’s freedom to make their own decisions about whether, when, and how to start a family. I’m standing up for the freedom to make decisions about our own bodies, including the right to access abortion care. I’m standing up for the freedom to marry who we love — and to live openly as who we are, free from discrimination or violence. And I’m committed to protecting the freedom to participate in our democracy — one where we respect the results of free and fair elections and refuse to let conspiracy theorists undermine the will of the people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Andrea Salinas | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: A.G. Holder
subject: It’s not the time for acceptance and resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The only check left on Donald Trump’s power is us. It’s the power of the people.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99312518/519519334/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZjEwMjAyLWJkYzMtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QpFviMgOz9IiyQdEOXuKLovCNOqRByNf3Jn6726sZao=&emci=fb3fc50c-afc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=43f10202-bdc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, Next month, Donald Trump and a radical Republican-led federal government will take office.

For much of his first presidency, Trump’s incompetence tended to mitigate somewhat the impact of his malevolence. But he still managed to seriously damage our democracy because many of the checks in our Constitution simply didn’t work. The Supreme Court, his attorneys general, the Senate and the House signed off on key pillars of a dangerous, anti-democracy agenda and always failed to hold him accountable.

**Given this, one thing is abundantly clear headed into Trump’s second term: The only check left on his power is us. It’s the power of the people: a power that is too often underestimated and too infrequently used.

This is not a time for acceptance and resignation — this is the time for commitment and action. **

[**So today I am personally asking you to donate to the NDRC before the end of the year to help us to do the hard, and absolutely necessary work of defending our democracy — help protect fair maps, combat ongoing gerrymandering, and prepare for the redistricting battles coming our way.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99312519/519519335/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGEOY_email_20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_campaign=AGEOY&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZjEwMjAyLWJkYzMtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QpFviMgOz9IiyQdEOXuKLovCNOqRByNf3Jn6726sZao=)

The Trump Republican Party just isn’t that into democracy — because their priority isn’t respecting the will of the people; it’s accruing the power to implement their agenda that caters to the special interests and perpetuates their illegitimate political control.

Want a recent example? Last month in North Carolina, in a lame duck legislative session and over the governor’s veto, Republicans added anti-democracy provisions (in a disaster relief bill!) that will take power away from the Democratic governor and give it to the newly elected Republican auditor. They are also attempting to restrict the ability of the incoming Democratic Attorney General to legally oppose any measures they might pass. It’s clear that Republicans care more about political control than getting needed relief to hurricane victims in the state. It’s also clear that they are willing to break our democracy to keep power they illegitimately hold.

**In the long run, the history of American democracy has always been one of grinding, halting, uneven success — even in the face of tyranny. So it must be again. **

Here’s the thing, though: We have to work for it. The path to progress has never been blazed through inertia. The NDRC has a strong 10 Year Plan. We know these efforts are paying off, and we know how to execute — we just need to make sure we have the financial resources to fund this work.

[**No matter how it feels today, it remains true: A better future is in reach, as long as we’re willing to fight for it. Are you with me? If so, please consider making a contribution.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99312520/519519336/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGEOY_email_20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_campaign=AGEOY&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZjEwMjAyLWJkYzMtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QpFviMgOz9IiyQdEOXuKLovCNOqRByNf3Jn6726sZao=)

Thank you,

Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99312521/519519337/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGEOY_email_20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_campaign=AGEOY&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZjEwMjAyLWJkYzMtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QpFviMgOz9IiyQdEOXuKLovCNOqRByNf3Jn6726sZao=)

If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. [Privacy Policy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99312524/519519340/1234366096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZjEwMjAyLWJkYzMtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QpFviMgOz9IiyQdEOXuKLovCNOqRByNf3Jn6726sZao=&emci=fb3fc50c-afc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=43f10202-bdc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=8431045)

We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. **[Click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99312525/519519341/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGEOY_email_20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241226-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOY_&utm_campaign=AGEOY&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZjEwMjAyLWJkYzMtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QpFviMgOz9IiyQdEOXuKLovCNOqRByNf3Jn6726sZao=)** to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression.

**_CONGRATULATIONS_**** _!_**

You have been selected as today's Patriot of the Day, Friend!

[**Peter, I’m humbly asking you to give an $3 contribution towards my people-powered movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312650/519519870/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241226_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1MzBjNi1iZmMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dfmxz1s543Z1u9XKBSOFNqR0wFKXNG7AkWJgH0VJ3lk=) Here’s why: | Because Trump’s administration picks from the House, _like Matt Gaetz and Elise Stefanik,_ have left us with multiple vacancies and **multiple opportunities to flip seats in 2025.**

Because Republicans have the **smallest House majority in history,** and we can make it smaller — they can _barely_ govern with a sizable majority, much less a razor-thin one!

Because these special elections could **shape the future,** and provide a _much-needed check_ to Trump’s power.

Because **_I don’t do a second of call time,_** so this campaign is by and for the people, and we need to raise **$15,000** to jumpstart these efforts. | [CONTRIBUTE $3 TO HELP RITCHIE TORRES FLIP VACANT HOUSE SEATS AND CRUSH THE MAGA MAJORITY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99312651/519519871/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241226_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTU1MzBjNi1iZmMzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dfmxz1s543Z1u9XKBSOFNqR0wFKXNG7AkWJgH0VJ3lk=)

Flipping as many seats as possible is _critical_ to safeguarding our Democracy, and there’s nothing more important than that.

**Protecting our Democracy is worth fighting for, so I’m humbly asking:**

[**Can you please chip in $3 or whatever you can to this grassroots movement and help us hit our $15,000 goal? Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | = = Here’s why: | Because Trump’s administration picks from the House, like Matt Gaetz and Elise Stefanik, have left us with multiple vacancies and multiple opportunities to flip seats in 2025. Because Republicans have the smallest House majority in history, and we can make it smaller — they can barely govern with a sizable majority, much less a razor-thin one! Because these special elections could shape the future, and provide a much-needed check to Trump’s power. Because I don’t do a second of call time, so this campaign is by and for the people, and we need to raise $15,000 to jumpstart these efforts. | = Flipping as many seats as possible is critical to safeguarding our Democracy, and there’s nothing more important than that. Protecting our Democracy is worth fighting for, so I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

* * *
Can you believe it? While Trump is busy catering to his ultra-rich buddies, he's plotting to dismantle the US Postal Service—a critical lifeline for countless communities across the country! This isn't just about delivering mail; it's about ensuring access to essential services, especially for rural areas and those who rely on the USPS for their medications, bills, and communication. The Post Office is enshrined in our Constitution, having been around since 1775—longer than the country itself! And guess what? Three-quarters of Americans support it! **We urgently need your help to push back against these reckless plans.** [**Will you chip in to support Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will protect the USPS from privatization and ensure it remains a public service dedicated to serving the American people?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lNq4L2kM5Cdq8lGWl3PtJDW7iX1wZXfGA9lxdWW0VtWV2KVC2FOTT3RXWlKxMZ3RcUPVxYfFiC0SH5ICr3pfUuz3reufeHQRF0AFAXsVl6DPpmFonUUXU8RSRcJv8FhgQeat_wedOBsEDnjO58hPTwScrtd53kWLg8Smro5znNtlFN09tziYPjWUOg8raG6RBr7VsmEkJttSxzZ89wCNlji2zt3j-zCpwCjM6AwdRrrplcvDrZdRMLAxW4lnUCUkd8nlMOPjkDis4l_xEM7yKNdsvme8Rfu3s4AdRsSGshUrTa-8-mQoykngsAnIBe7MuDJh06SsGapaLyRUif4flNNaUs9kS89m7zk9rj_ZfcRc/4cm/VP-tI94gQl6IpqmqbMwi4g/h2/h001.xP7L8Jo-dq12pQLDrUwGdTbr-Ml-X_PIAYUTz6m4bDo) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

While Trump is busy catering to his ultra-rich buddies, he's plotting to dismantle the US Postal Service—a critical lifeline for countless communities across the country! **_I’m ready to be the Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor for families across New Jersey, but it’s going to take all of us to get there._** Our end-of-year deadline is our first chance to show our strength and build up the resources we need as we head into the new year.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: With Trump, now is our chance
body:
Now the fight begins
| Friend, I’m Riley Gaines, the Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. I know what it’s like to stare radical leftism in the face. After all, I had to swim a race against a 6-foot-tall man.
**But Friend, we can work to put those days behind us now.** With Donald Trump back in the White House, you and I have a unique opportunity to turn the tide for women’s rights across America. American voters have proven with this election that they’ve had enough of the lunacy. They’ve had enough of the attacks on the very foundations of our society and our families. And they turned out in masses and voted to restore common sense. But this is only the beginning. While conservatives celebrate this victory, the left's agenda remains a significant threat to our rights and opportunities.
Because Friend , there are still leftist bureaucrats, elected and unelected, working to stop common sense Americans from setting things right.
**_You and I must be vigilant and proactive in defending the rights of female athletes and students everywhere._**
There is great opportunity in these turbulent times. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to ensuring that women’s voices are heard, and their rights are protected. It’s what my ambassadors work for -- day in and day out.
Right now, the Riley Gaines Center needs to raise $300,000 to start 2025 with a bang. This is a call to action for all who believe in fairness and biological reality.
[Your support will empower my Ambassadors and I to educate, mobilize, and advocate for policies that protect women’s rights.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=efa82f423da04b708bc533919e734789&_e=Jd3iW272tX9MG8FPvIiCsQkLEaf8Qwb80xzKQDOnxxgkp2PwbiGT4nUYwW3BhiuWRWdDmnKioi7Omwb_LZEKaondPrJBfVVChokB1RPpq4mQeE8wJj1IC-HIAaTlwUB_iQt3Hi5fj60j2rjP1MHC23rZMfQnXlh8wXHpmxA4EXskUgfGxzXlv_G2VMMacYTkdoAEwnaJo3Z24BeZFn7h8dq3Cnt3sQtUXL0DYnWSfbOg_qwWga-KxUnFZau-dOuoCg6QjX81bUKJ0yxcp8w4RrEwpFECmmHTocyZrzJTe8VIY3MnXIY1ZkLaK_pqlkRr6g7vK1ci7IJdEaaSdtTzvD9ZT__fufmgqb6F7CLZpoMba_nmzLU4zPOlQIV_BIdX) Together, you and I can make a difference. Join in this fight for fairness and equality. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute

name: [MATCH EXPIRING]
subject: Christmas meal goal missed >>
body:
Make a matched, tax-deductible gift to help provide holiday meals.
Military heroes are serving in cold, isolated locations instead of spending the holidays with their families. Many service members wouldn't be able to take part in the joy of holiday traditions like a festive Christmas meal without the support of you and the USO.
**But we fell short of our goal to fund 3,000 holiday meals before Christmas. That 's why we're asking for your help right now. You can DOUBLE* the value of your gift to help provide our heroes in uniform with warm meals and other critical support before 2024 ends!****
Our generous friends at Airbus are MATCHING all gifts to the USO until midnight tonight to help provide essential programs and support -- including holiday meals -- for our service members.
**[Will you donate $37.50 or more now and DOUBLE your impact towards holiday meals and other support for service members before midnight?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-ehp3DaAML/NSsyTkUvWE03TmJobWxRalFuTlZXdUxEazJuRTBqMzlldVE5clluMUFQYXZMWFBueWRZMlBlVHc5aVR5TkVsUURRTEgzeXNubkJuTzkzNDA4UkVoSnFVTzJaN3hCZzZFMFh1ZmZLR1pPWm89S0/WTBMc3BCNFZrK0hBNHludjRQbmJuOFVUNDhuNWowd3ZKaWU4WHIzODZKNGwyMGdFQWVJTXExVDRHK1czMXVWVnExNi9acjZNTVM5M3NUREpSdU5FT05BaTZkckw5a3haS0)**

The holidays can be one of the most difficult times of year for deployed service members. **We fell short of our critical goal to fund 3,000 holiday meals and other programs for our military heroes, but our generous partners at Airbus are now matching all gifts, up to a total of $25,000, until midnight to give us one more chance to reach our goal.**
That means you still have one more chance to DOUBLE the value of your holiday gift for service members: **[Will you make a tax-deductible donation now that will be MATCHED to provide active-duty service members with warm holiday meals and connections to home?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[$37.50 CAN HELP FUND
1 HOLIDAY MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP FUND
2 HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/9PKLhwgYqZF-/NSsyTkUvWE03TmJobWxRalFuTlZXdUxEazJuRTBqMzlldVE5clluMUFQYXZMWFBueWRZMlBlVHc5aVR5TkVsUURRTEgzeXNubkJuTzkzNDA4UkVoSnFVTzJaN3hCZzZFMFh1ZmZLR1pPWm89S0/WTBMc3BCNFZrK0hBNHludjRQbmJuOFVUNDhuNWowd3ZKaWU4WHIzODZKNGwyMGdFQWVJTXExVDRHK1czMXVWVnExNi9acjZNTVM5M3NUREpSdU5FT05BaTZkckw5a3haS0)
---
[HAVE ANOTHER AMOUNT MATCHED ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Right now, instead of spending time with their families, our service members are deployed all over the world making immense sacrifices to serve our country.
The least we can do is give them the opportunity to sit down for a warm, hearty meal after another long day away from their loved ones. No matter how far their service takes them, it's up to us to find a way to deliver a taste of home.
"I couldn't be home ... so you brought home to me," a service member shared after a holiday meal in Japan. "Thank you for everything you do, USO."
**[Please: Can we count on you to rush a Christmas gift to support our brave military heroes this holiday season? If you make a tax-deductible donation of $37.50 or more before midnight tonight, it will be DOUBLED by Airbus to help fund even more holiday support for our service members.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-0wamFZ/NSsyTkUvWE03TmJobWxRalFuTlZXdUxEazJuRTBqMzlldVE5clluMUFQYXZMWFBueWRZMlBlVHc5aVR5TkVsUURRTEgzeXNubkJuTzkzNDA4UkVoSnFVTzJaN3hCZzZFMFh1ZmZLR1pPWm89S0/WTBMc3BCNFZrK0hBNHludjRQbmJuOFVUNDhuNWowd3ZKaWU4WHIzODZKNGwyMGdFQWVJTXExVDRHK1czMXVWVnExNi9acjZNTVM5M3NUREpSdU5FT05BaTZkckw5a3haS0)**
[DOUBLE MY HOLIDAY GIFT FOR SERVICE MEMBERS](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting those who sacrifice so much to serve us and our country.
--The USO
*Airbus is matching all gifts to the USO, dollar-for-dollar, up to a total of $25,000, through December 26, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

clean_body: Make a matched, tax-deductible gift to help provide holiday meals. Military heroes are serving in cold, isolated locations instead of spending the holidays with their families. Many service members wouldn't be able to take part in the joy of holiday traditions like a festive Christmas meal without the support of you and the USO. But we fell short of our goal to fund 3,000 holiday meals before Christmas. That 's why we're asking for your help right now. You can DOUBLE the value of your gift to help provide our heroes in uniform with warm meals and other critical support before 2024 ends!** Our generous friends at Airbus are MATCHING all gifts to the USO until midnight tonight to help provide essential programs and support -- including holiday meals -- for our service members. Thank you for standing with our service members during this difficult time of year. Your support helps ensure they feel the warmth and care of home, no matter where they serve. --The USO From: holiday-meals@uso.org Sent: Thursday, December 26, 2024 Subject: We missed our holiday meals goal for service members The holidays can be one of the most difficult times of year for deployed service members. We fell short of our critical goal to fund 3,000 holiday meals and other programs for our military heroes, but our generous partners at Airbus are now matching all gifts, up to a total of $25,000, until midnight to give us one more chance to reach our goal. That means you still have one more chance to DOUBLE the value of your holiday gift for service members: Right now, instead of spending time with their families, our service members are deployed all over the world making immense sacrifices to serve our country. The least we can do is give them the opportunity to sit down for a warm, hearty meal after another long day away from their loved ones. No matter how far their service takes them, it's up to us to find a way to deliver a taste of home. "I couldn't be home ... so you brought home to me," a service member shared after a holiday meal in Japan. "Thank you for everything you do, USO." Thank you for supporting those who sacrifice so much to serve us and our country. --The USO Airbus is matching all gifts to the USO, dollar-for-dollar, up to a total of $25,000, through December 26, 2024. Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families. name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Happy Holidays, Peter!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=BHQuHzX9bIHxsmGVW6prisoV5ffrUwbV2L741fd3ceRWpc0E1TLrrogcWpz0oA8ykOny%2Bt6U7NXNPXfA2Dxy%2FDAvTQA7myu4H2HngYpglxeBqTx2CxTQvVHN2GPtmmtRqeCUMEAtbfMNHcbT%2FetvMuOBE3XkNpd9t8X1c%2BbY2UEFi%2FXsDamjpIz%2FKJcUyxIszMZgB1r7U7fzb2%2Fk3MwkkvjjgGoRtS%2BOd%2F%2Ffmiq5YviSHX%2BId2%2F7qpopS0mLIIOiSoxiEVAJJqeB9i2ABTZeSzJAci966vwiP94sFv54bYG2hH%2BaA1w29GuN7DnOw8wfIlodviO2xtwdL%2F3TY4h2aSSC3zdp7sKcj17R8asZFDjy8wzngbK1QwZN7x2Ujy98GGeEce58YYEq1SEL7J7fDlVDex3i4FykV9Ejml6LRNQ%3D]

# [#]
Happy Holidays, Peter! We hope you’re having a restful time with your family, friends, and loved ones.

We wanted to use this time to not only recharge for the year ahead, but reflect on the year we’ve had. Like many of you, we felt the weight of this presidential election and results in our state.

But even with these losses, we’re so proud of the work we accomplished. Every dollar supporters like you contributed went directly to building the power and voices of Black and Latino communities in Texas.

As we recharge for 2025 and beyond, we know we’re gearing up for a big fight ahead. With conservatives fighting for their destructive agenda in the upcoming legislative session, it’s imperative that we have the resources to organize for the rights of EVERY Texan ― no matter age, race, faith, or gender.

That’s why we’ve set a $3,000 end-of-year fundraising goal to hit before December 31st. If you’re all in to join us in the fight against MAGA extremism in Texas, can you chip in $ or ANY amount right now to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-dec24?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-dec24?amount=&express_lane=true] DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-dec24?amount=&express_lane=true]

DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-dec24?amount=&express_lane=true] OTHER AMOUNT » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-dec24]

Thank you, and hope you have a restful holiday!

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Happy Holidays, Peter! We hope you’re having a restful time with your family, friends, and loved ones. We wanted to use this time to not only recharge for the year ahead, but reflect on the year we’ve had. Like many of you, we felt the weight of this presidential election and results in our state. But even with these losses, we’re so proud of the work we accomplished. Every dollar supporters like you contributed went directly to building the power and voices of Black and Latino communities in Texas. As we recharge for 2025 and beyond, we know we’re gearing up for a big fight ahead. With conservatives fighting for their destructive agenda in the upcoming legislative session, it’s imperative that we have the resources to organize for the rights of EVERY Texan ― no matter age, race, faith, or gender. That’s why we’ve set a $3,000 end-of-year fundraising goal to hit before December 31st. If you’re all in to join us in the fight against MAGA extremism in Texas, can you chip in $ or ANY amount right now to help us reach our goal? name: House GOP Election Integrity Team
subject: YOU have been one of the strongest advocates for election integrity in 2024.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Can we get your opinion ONE LAST TIME before the new Congress is sworn in?

| |
---
| | | Friend - your name keeps showing up in our records.

**We just combed through countless surveys, polls, and petitions and found that YOU have been one of the strongest advocates for election integrity in 2024.**

Because of this, we curated a BRAND NEW survey just for you! Please fill out our quick 5-question survey and give us your honest, unfiltered feedback.

_**[Here's a preview:](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9db2df9b7ef2411c8f435415e234b898&_e=zK-KyP_IbxZ_nfej2Sz6DsjSbNoyICoSLyipTkYqVzUiNOmNkiuFDrwiFgiFHucv0NGLO0_V69t07eCYT1eOfJIRVwSPT2pq1y7xwt1fzHaYml8MJSwst-ZH4plLvynyDef9cneq79J_dQ-gTxlIeSClhfJ_Z_PhOiL9jpCLhm9Y6r0IlqKT-bnSduXLQUVAym0nSgRdEVj7iwpmLhfchrHBsRy9xBEFrsXNlKGrurI0rPFa8StaUV0_lY3v7fm2s8izEXQ7OdblzyTBKtiXaHgCy6KHN2ObPbqH257vCHfyVSKZaEqzrTRNwTj99Gxy-idFk02XyuND6I27jztsvbHtBzhNO5hx1cn67KwFPIDPWhg5lBYTbPfaQkcoAPgwGWGZVwNgPd2mWIS7DoGphimCjNafRjkAHXlQ8JI9CS3O52727d2YsZ8tpsOF2bwc7EcELArySANI5r-mZEaZt8JXrBj8eAri8gzd4RRFja0%3D "Here’s a preview:")**_
_1) Do you believe we should mandate voter ID laws nationwide?
2) Do you believe we should enforce signature verification checks?
3) Do you believe we should require proof of citizenship for voters?
4) Do you believe we should tabulate votes within 72 hours of Election Day?
5) Do you have any other ideas you'd like to share?_ | | [FINAL ELECTION INTEGRITY SURVEY:
RESPOND NOW](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9db2df9b7ef2411c8f435415e234b898&_e=zK-KyP_IbxZ_nfej2Sz6DsjSbNoyICoSLyipTkYqVzUiNOmNkiuFDrwiFgiFHucv0NGLO0_V69t07eCYT1eOfJIRVwSPT2pq1y7xwt1fzHaYml8MJSwst-ZH4plLvynyDef9cneq79J_dQ-gTxlIeSClhfJ_Z_PhOiL9jpCLhm9Y6r0IlqKT-bnSduXLQUVAym0nSgRdEVj7iwpmLhfchrHBsRy9xBEFrsXNlKGrurI0rPFa8StaUV0_lY3v7fm2s8izEXQ7OdblzyTBKtiXaHgCy6KHN2ObPbqH257vCHfyVSKZaEqzrTRNwTj99GxyGbGCzBSGhzEdUSFoxGu53M4QR-3F2m8DM_dthagHm1Ym2p51AmMjdT-EP_mO_ap3sUe3vI1SF0xuxyMm6lUMSXZ4tXL3k9mJ8VyMPVlYbdkYdkP_eAjDAeGQZ09tFMjQRWNn77CVOKuuEXQtJGY0C4Ev73pHAIbdZHErYJn_EfM%3D "FINAL ELECTION INTEGRITY SURVEY: RESPOND NOW")
---

Election integrity is a top priority for our incoming House Majority. With President Trump by our side, we will make sure to restore the American People's trust in our elections again. But we don't want to move forward without input from our most trusted supporters.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99314641/519525469/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTRkZDM0OS1jY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HW8lIrCCxxdfd5ORzVFBD9H8CFqwJu7oD3-WwGrcBx4=&emci=2e4b8a34-38be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e94dd349-ccc3-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15759664)

Derek, Here's what we know. **Virginians will go to the polls on January 7, 2025, for three special elections to fill vacancies in Senate District 32 (Loudoun County), House of Delegates District 26 (Loudoun County), and Senate District 10 (Central Virginia).** _The outcome of these special elections will be relevant to Democrats nationwide. The results will show, several months after Trump's election, whether everyday Americans are recognizing they've been conned again by the MAGA machine._ [_**Derek, all eyes will be on Virginia and our statewide and General Assembly elections.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99314644/519525472/-807643367?&refcode=E11829-20241226-EOY1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTRkZDM0OS1jY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HW8lIrCCxxdfd5ORzVFBD9H8CFqwJu7oD3-WwGrcBx4=) | **************[PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99314647/519525474/-807643367?&refcode=E11829-20241226-EOY1-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTRkZDM0OS1jY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HW8lIrCCxxdfd5ORzVFBD9H8CFqwJu7oD3-WwGrcBx4=)**************
---
With an open governor's seat after 3.5 years of MAGA control and razor-thin majorities for Democrats in the House of Delegates and the Senate, how Virginia votes in 2025 will be a referendum on Trump's presidency, extremist MAGA candidates up and down the ballot — and yes, the strength of the Democratic party.
**Virginia's elections next year can propel Democrats nationally into a commanding position. Victories across our Commonwealth in 2025 can generate the momentum Democrats everywhere need to win in 2026 — and beyond.**
_We can only do this with you, Derek. It's going to take a lot of work and resources. At DPVA, we're ready, willing, and able to take on this task — but we must know you're with us._
[_**Can you pitch in now to help us raise $10,675 by midnight on New Year's Eve so we can hit the ground running on January 1, 2025?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99314649/519525478/-807643367?&refcode=E11829-20241226-EOY1-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTRkZDM0OS1jY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HW8lIrCCxxdfd5ORzVFBD9H8CFqwJu7oD3-WwGrcBx4=)
**************[PLEASE DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99314651/519525481/-807643367?&refcode=E11829-20241226-EOY1-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTRkZDM0OS1jY2MzLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HW8lIrCCxxdfd5ORzVFBD9H8CFqwJu7oD3-WwGrcBx4=)**************

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Here’s the situation, Peter:

Our final fundraising deadline of 2024 is approaching in just five days.

Right now, we’re behind on reaching our end-of-year goal of $100,000.
Raising this amount is imperative to our 2026 Candidate Recruitment
efforts.

Because Justice Democrats doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs — unlike
the right-wing megadonor-backed candidates and super PACs trying to tear
us down — we mean it when we say we rely on grassroots supporters like you
to power our organization. That’s how we were able to recruit and elect
our bloc of working-class progressives like AOC, Summer Lee, Rashida
Tlaib, and more.

With powerful groups like AIPAC, the Crypto lobby, and other corporate
interests spending more than ever before in history to buy seats in
Congress, we need to reach this critical goal to start 2025 in a strong
position to take on the fights ahead.

Thank you for anything you can contribute to fuel our progressive,
working-class movement in the New Year. We appreciate you!

— Justice Democrats

name: Seth Moulton
subject: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Sometimes we need to be willing to say the quiet part out loud even when the truth is uncomfortable: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats.

Yet, when I said that the party needed to stop looking down its nose at the very voters we lost across every corner of the country, and be willing to have open conversations about tough issues like the economy, the border, and divisive cultural issues, some in our party got very angry.

The chair of the local Democratic Party called me a Nazi cooperator. The head of the Political Science Department of a major Boston university said that my office was no longer welcome to contact them. And a primary challenger has already registered to run against me.

And all of this despite an overwhelming number of national voices echoing my concerns, not to mention the hundreds of calls and texts I’ve received from voters who said themselves, “I agree with you Seth, but it feels like I’m not allowed to say that out loud.”

It’s starting to feel like some Democrats just don’t want to win. Well, I do. And if you agree, I need your help.

If you’re with me, please consider making an early contribution to my re-election campaign. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Make no mistake: if we aren’t willing to have difficult conversations as a party and if we continue to push out any voter that doesn’t adhere to the extreme left’s self-defined purity tests, we will continue to lose elections. And, as a result, the vulnerable people whose rights you and I want to protect are the people who will be hurt the most.

As a Marine, I learned about the power of the wisdom that emerges from a group of people with different opinions and experiences. I also learned to be a fighter. I will continue to fight for the individual freedoms of every American. But in order to do that we need to start by winning elections.

Join me today.

Seth

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

name: Weston D. Imer - RNC Youth Council
subject: 20 Days until the RNC Winter Meeting!
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
I am excited to be attending the RNC Winter Meeting and the 60th Presidential Inauguration in Washington, DC!
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001g6HJjji2tuwzl_vEAVfU-HGkTKITxIVNyxJyGwDt3Bo02jgfouvwiRlJ5e2m3DpH_uQfjgKavzDT51d4-ThJdHOe01AJefwV1lLT-kwm1ayKk_2XWJ9NX-6MjI0CPJomlS3CzbTZ5CB53TcZs_n2-G_obYHxzrPPA9jbI8lUgbLGnEvrRi5wIe4T1PjYoVyS2DAH9oafq0w=&c=Z57UC1ZLewT0fwOsyBAMCZEbbr2vPW_QK3HSLXTD5xm9veAOP0W5jw==&ch=eIO-4fNp5M4IvRdS-sfbmSHrP6igjHHEbcTMmXYm8e0tjL3kIIXvRw==)
---
Friend, We are 20 days away from the Republican National Committee's Winter Meeting and 25 away from the 60th Presidential Inauguration in Washington, DC.
As a member of the RNC's Youth Advisory Council, I will be traveling to our nation's capital in just 20 days. There, I will spend 10 days attending the RNC Winter Re-Org Meeting, followed by the Inauguration of President Trump and Vice President-Elect JD Vance.
It has been one of the greatest honors of my life to represent my generation on the national level at the RNC, and clearly, our efforts were successful.
Spending 10 days in DC, especially during the Inaugural week, is a heavy burden. During the inaugural week, hotel rates are north of $800 a night.
If you are able and willing, I would greatly appreciate a contribution to my RNC Travel Fund. Thanks to your generous support, I have attended all of the RNC meetings in 2023 and 2024, as well as council meetings in Washington, DC, at RNC HQ and the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, WI.
As we enter 2025, I am asking for your support one last time so I can attend the 2025 Winter Meeting and the Presidential Inauguration.

clean_body: I am excited to be attending the RNC Winter Meeting and the 60th Presidential Inauguration in Washington, DC! | | | | | == Friend, We are 20 days away from the Republican National Committee's Winter Meeting and 25 away from the 60th Presidential Inauguration in Washington, DC. As a member of the RNC's Youth Advisory Council, I will be traveling to our nation's capital in just 20 days. There, I will spend 10 days attending the RNC Winter Re-Org Meeting, followed by the Inauguration of President Trump and Vice President-Elect JD Vance. It has been one of the greatest honors of my life to represent my generation on the national level at the RNC, and clearly, our efforts were successful. Spending 10 days in DC, especially during the Inaugural week, is a heavy burden. During the inaugural week, hotel rates are north of $800 a night. If you are able and willing, I would greatly appreciate a contribution to my RNC Travel Fund. Thanks to your generous support, I have attended all of the RNC meetings in 2023 and 2024, as well as council meetings in Washington, DC, at RNC HQ and the Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, WI. As we enter 2025, I am asking for your support one last time so I can attend the 2025 Winter Meeting and the Presidential Inauguration. | == | == | I am excited to be attending the Winter Meeting and Inauguration, and I look forward to providing you with my full report, as always, after the conclusion of the events in DC. In the meantime, I thank you for your continued support. MAGA! Best, | | == | | == | Weston D. | Though we are oceans apart geographically, the United States and Israel have historically stood together - through wars, political uncertainty, international crises, a global pandemic, and times like these when tensions in Israel are at an all-time high.

Throughout their history-from biblical times, to the Holocaust, to the horrific October 7 attacks - God's children have all too often faced hatred and persecution. I need to be honest with you, team –

Every week, our PAC needs to raise a certain amount of money in order to keep our projects up and running and support Democracy Defenders.

This month, that number is $11,550/week. Our weekly deadline is tomorrow at midnight and we're only 51% to that critical goal.

[**_We've seen a serious slowdown since Donald Trump won reelection and honestly, it's worrying me. We need to get Democrats back on the right track so we can combat MAGA-extremism together. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: You can DOUBLE your impact for a better Mississippi!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/doubleimpact?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, As 2024 ends, I wish you and your loved ones a Happy New Year!

**The past year brought meaningful change for Mississippi, including education funding reform as a step towards full School Choice.** But there is more work to be done, with opposition to School Choice that we need to overcome.

With your continued support, we will achieve even more in 2025. And now, you can double your impact.

**Every individual donation made before December 31, 2024, will be matched dollar-for-dollar, thanks to a generous matching grant. Your $50 becomes $100, and your $5,000 becomes $10,000.**
---
| [Yes, I want to double my impact](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=60db3559ba&e=5703353baa "Yes, I want to double my impact")
---
| I hope you will consider investing in Mississippi’s future by investing in MCPP’s work. Thank you for all that you do for the liberty movement in Mississippi and America!

Thank you for standing alongside us in the fight for School Choice. Happy New Year!
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)
