name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Mutual aid opportunities this holiday season
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241226-1163-foote&t=1001&akid=1163%2E342411%2ESdm8jW ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Giving back to our communities is a crucial part of our progressive
movement, so we’re working hard to provide support to thousands of
community members who are in need of our generosity and collective help
this holiday season.

We want to uplift local organizations in our Squad’s communities and the
work they’re doing to support our neighbors — and we’ll share more of that
work with you below. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241226-movement.pzFZ0H&refcode=em20241226-1163&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1163%2E342411%2ESdm8jW ]Will you split a contribution of any amount to
these mutual aid organizations? 100% of the proceeds will go directly to
these charities and their crucial work.[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241226-movement.pzFZ0H&refcode=em20241226-1163&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1163%2E342411%2ESdm8jW ]Contribute ››

* The Immigrant Family Services Institute is a nonprofit organization
based in Massachusetts committed to improving lives and increasing
opportunities for recent immigrants and their families. They provide
academic support to immigrant children, advocate for immigrant rights,
and support finding alternative paths to citizenship.
* The Brightmoor Connection Food Pantry is a collaborative effort
between nine churches and two organizations based in Detroit, Michigan
determined to address food insecurity for their communities.
* Sapna NYC is a Bronx-based community organization that works with
immigrant women and families in NYC addressing health inequities,
fostering women’s empowerment, and building community power. Sapna’s
Emergency Support Fund helps vulnerable community members with
essential needs like food, housing, health, and safety.
* The Sabathani Community Center is one of Minnesota’s oldest African
American-founded nonprofits. They are a multi-service organization
delivering a comprehensive range of community-oriented services such
as food shelves, clothing drives, social, recreational, and education
opportunities for their Senior Program, workforce strategies — and
much more.

We know that the holidays can be difficult for many, so a contribution of
any amount will make a massive difference in these organization’s ability
to continue supporting our neighbors. [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241226-movement.pzFZ0H&refcode=em20241226-1163&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1163%2E342411%2ESdm8jW ]Even if you can give just $4 —
one dollar to each of these organizations — it would mean so much to our
movement.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241226-movement.pzFZ0H&refcode=em20241226-1163&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1163%2E342411%2ESdm8jW ]Contribute ››

We’re proud to lead with compassion, gratitude, and solidarity for one
another. Throughout it all, Peter,
we want to thank you for being a part of
this work.

Together,

Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1163%2E342411%2ESdm8jW

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Lara Trump
subject: Make no mistake, this is about all of America’s children.
body:
I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99351f1ba4e3468085b992ab32f90f4d&_e=IyK_hUamxWD07xLvw8YYxE7j0tHi2P8EAJcSBgK_0twiGh_ujNzC3FILlPAVok0Z8dN49IrJuz4h2RQMoJk-AAsq06NmKBMDeOAf0SO4UzuAMZ9F_1_OsG6W6PXbH8ZjwP7IzBl1LI6fVFOS7g0vjyZ06Ujt9UTFJRIm1cbJZw1NnKibBoZ3Nbu1yzpPmZiahuoQhz7HwUQaBXiiFu1YV9YdykYLljDb3f87ict9aJI2aHU_G0bISvKjhdE3No2uTaVzBKKdjFA5owIw_jD7cq3eMfPlVVQKx_BjOEj1WfBuADCmHQIv8U7j9q2VbgPO97C85YrOIbwIBeHczVY-QtKt76w2IQD8JJUgDfzIAbMta-mWUKlQvBoQSjjpeizIFaTIz1X6xrX8SIdn8Hk0aQ%3D%3D)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99351f1ba4e3468085b992ab32f90f4d&_e=IyK_hUamxWD07xLvw8YYxE7j0tHi2P8EAJcSBgK_0twiGh_ujNzC3FILlPAVok0Z8dN49IrJuz4h2RQMoJk-AAsq06NmKBMDeOAf0SO4UzuAMZ9F_1_OsG6W6PXbH8ZjwP7IzBl1LI6fVFOS7g0vjyZ06Ujt9UTFJRIm1cbJZw1NnKibBoZ3Nbu1yzpPmZiahuoQhz7HwUQaBXiiFu1YV9YdykYLljDb3f87ict9aJJEiFnC0xYo9H0OvVe1OSUP6-68YzeoFgbOsfPNgZXpyKvNd2VCM2ecz00leWMpUxOrRb1K8GCmbinjr1lhyH975KLrGTyPqB8bxY2_euhbBxJrNNQMw40UTQEBibbXM4AKj2Hu0Ib1I5tfgmcHrWxKJdYdxI73ZpCviUs4-m8SHA%3D%3D)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army.Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking:"This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree.But here's the reality.So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children.But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts.And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left.In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99351f1ba4e3468085b992ab32f90f4d&_e=IyK_hUamxWD07xLvw8YYxE7j0tHi2P8EAJcSBgK_0twiGh_ujNzC3FILlPAVok0Z8dN49IrJuz4h2RQMoJk-AAsq06NmKBMDeOAf0SO4UzuAMZ9F_1_OsG6W6PXbH8ZjwP7IzBl1LI6fVFOS7g0vjyZ06Ujt9UTFJRIm1cbJZw1NnKibBoZ3Nbu1yzpPmZiahuoQhz7HwUQaBXiiFu1YV9YdykYLljDb3f87ict9aJJqBwptPkUuH9Ih4DGn0-x81n4qFSArU959pH_889IjZsYlALDnGguGYdbhUdcuXxnsv6UZUgP7EfjWEEDsJe3oNK300G7K7euko3z6xFjTEHtPpVWQmvfVu0ZPjcPwM0ZPnlqHPGfVPWGIPIKCoTRG8rP31nczly59umA7m-h75g%3D%3D)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99351f1ba4e3468085b992ab32f90f4d&_e=IyK_hUamxWD07xLvw8YYxE7j0tHi2P8EAJcSBgK_0twiGh_ujNzC3FILlPAVok0Z8dN49IrJuz4h2RQMoJk-AAsq06NmKBMDeOAf0SO4UzuAMZ9F_1_OsG6W6PXbH8ZjwP7IzBl1LI6fVFOS7g0vjyZ06Ujt9UTFJRIm1cbJZw1NnKibBoZ3Nbu1yzpPmZiahuoQhz7HwUQaBXiiFu1YV9YdykYLljDb3f87ict9aJKy4BSLq412QDNRhlooKUPUaAPjpmheCBx9BqIoEuP2WpzRL9XqG3IsDGkvm1ARJs2_EB3D85NZAyBrssjyOs8Te4VCgP__9IjzUt4v_ktLYoDGkyH4nKlTk8khb_bWm2IkTayo1WBymaPKY9-i7beagTLNmVzDKxh6K0GyXHhKfA%3D%3D)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99351f1ba4e3468085b992ab32f90f4d&_e=IyK_hUamxWD07xLvw8YYxE7j0tHi2P8EAJcSBgK_0twiGh_ujNzC3FILlPAVok0Z8dN49IrJuz4h2RQMoJk-AAsq06NmKBMDeOAf0SO4UzuAMZ9F_1_OsG6W6PXbH8ZjwP7IzBl1LI6fVFOS7g0vjyZ06Ujt9UTFJRIm1cbJZw1NnKibBoZ3Nbu1yzpPmZiahuoQhz7HwUQaBXiiFu1YV9YdykYLljDb3f87ict9aJIKQ0l36uO6hyPRg2QvFGFHEALNOphwvF2lz2dJByWsBcRLNa9uEHDdA8paLitr31THGYKzdo9exEqHXkw6v2Vu9QJt0ZJsot_XH39e4I7kLw2d1PdcJFGXDKtbOyk559ZL4cHZL8sCS4WC5O767KihT44m7EzDjcTL6nOCiZ1nxw%3D%3D)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.**I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99351f1ba4e3468085b992ab32f90f4d&_e=IyK_hUamxWD07xLvw8YYxE7j0tHi2P8EAJcSBgK_0twiGh_ujNzC3FILlPAVok0Z8dN49IrJuz4h2RQMoJk-AAsq06NmKBMDeOAf0SO4UzuAMZ9F_1_OsG6W6PXbH8ZjwP7IzBl1LI6fVFOS7g0vjyZ06Ujt9UTFJRIm1cbJZw1NnKibBoZ3Nbu1yzpPmZiahuoQhz7HwUQaBXiiFu1YV9YdykYLljDb3f87ict9aJL-lZFYNjmVy1yi8midxj8uJzLbP-wvuLgzhAgJNWPlEEb_xGZCmpS7BCdVEedCZyjlj8xGWmtopAAzJXtbMja9B2InDCHnrL62wXZjUK_13AgQccpwbdfu_KraB6ialOWy32GvLXE6Wd1FiulMaQA0groNYfSY_CaHw-FZ4iYBPA%3D%3D), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author
---

Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda......it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out.That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie......if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them.Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders.That is what we're up against.And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values.Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country."See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on!That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance.My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them.In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side.Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies.I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side.For America and America's Children, | | Lara TrumpWife, Mother, and Author | | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left. Thank you! - Lara | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304

President-elect Donald Trump **[dropped a very bad word](https://substack.com/redirect/c1b9e4e7-aa90-44c8-bf27-6aaab9fcb632?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during his speech in Arizona at Turning Point USA's AmericaFest 2024, but what happened next was unexpected.
"We have to stop woke! Woke is ********!" Trump told the crowd.
**[Watch how the crowd responded:](https://substack.com/redirect/c1b9e4e7-aa90-44c8-bf27-6aaab9fcb632?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Trump's occasional use of bad words is one of his many features that makes him relatable to everyday Americans. Unlike phony, overly polished politicians on the left and the right, Trump is never afraid to tell it like it is and thats why so many love him.
* * *

# **CNN host ENDS the segment when Republican drops TRUTH BOMB live on air**
A CNN panel host **[admitted live on air that Hunter Biden was involved](https://substack.com/redirect/5b83077c-71fc-4dad-af7c-a447f4db0c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in possibly corrupt business dealings in China and Ukraine, before abruptly shuffling the conversation along.
**[Watch the uncomfortable moment below:](https://substack.com/redirect/5b83077c-71fc-4dad-af7c-a447f4db0c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5b83077c-71fc-4dad-af7c-a447f4db0c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5b83077c-71fc-4dad-af7c-a447f4db0c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This pardon goes back 10 years," a CNN panel guest said referring to Joe Biden's pardoning of Hunter. "You remove any further criminal scrutiny for the dealings that Hunter and maybe Joe Biden himself had in Ukraine but more specifically China."
CNN's Erin Burnett surprisingly agreed with the guest, clarifying for the audience that he was talking about Hunter's eyebrow-raising position on the board of Ukrainian energy company Burisma as well has his mysterious Chinese business dealings.

clean_body: The latest election results have shown us just how narrow our majority is - with only 220 House seats to the Democrats' 215, every single seat counts. | Fellow Conservative, The stakes have never been higher. With the Democrats' relentless push to undermine our conservative values, we need leaders like Jimmy Patronis who will stand strong alongside President Trump. As a proven ally of the President, Jimmy will fight every day to secure America's future and defend our way of life. But the Democrats are targeting this seat in the upcoming Special Election, and we cannot afford to lose it. The latest election results have shown us just how narrow our majority is - with only 220 House seats to the Democrats' 215, every single seat counts. We can't let the Democrats chip away at our gains and jeopardize President Trump's agenda. That's why Every dollar counts in this crucial election, and with your support, we can make sure Jimmy has the resources he needs to win. | Official Donor File EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #[Redacted] DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $15 or more | | to stand with President Trump and help Elect Republicans. | | | | The future of our country is at stake, Fellow Conservative. We can't afford to lose this seat. ** Please give what you can today. Sincerely, Elect Republicans HQ Need help? body:

Hey Peter, From my family to yours, happy holidays! I hope you are having a happy holiday season and enjoying time with loved ones. After a busy year, it’s important to take a moment, slow down, and reset — and enjoy all of the holiday festivities! Thank you for being a part of this team. It means the world to me, and I’m excited to kick off the new year with you by my side. Wiley

subject: I’m running for Congress in Florida’s Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIMMY PATRONIS, INC
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c4f4144473fc40b4a8ca83121960ddd4&_e=m0U4-FJPREfjMivprfbPnB4ucpivuo10y3wOJoMzdEmDUgxDDbOKgu13ExwxvdLMMRO1h2KOG7Dc01aZVjDVaBTstCJGsQ9hCteyl1nS-a3GIeY92wm4q0fXR0lZc-EEamnO8pKuSXAKiRV2W0j8Vzdxiyc7OdWO9K6NUxosNB9vjvbWK5HQGig2s1poDNdzlI7NYiDC--_nOnlUx1v-3BE-K7PnEI6reouPtBpvCkh8Tl9oYYand949ofZ4bm47GlMahiyb0os25phy4BhN6dil2fJZWXR5Q2oIq4TFZx-6PK-imsBTxsLYw5wm1QaayB2kF9gg8msORv5Ay6EO7Iy6cM9p87vb8RvKNbLOUqTRdrNBV8EiYhqIo2cO_DJQ)

| | Peter, my name is Jimmy Patronis.
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c4f4144473fc40b4a8ca83121960ddd4&_e=m0U4-FJPREfjMivprfbPnB4ucpivuo10y3wOJoMzdEkU2fKftslxH2gBwkT6oqAsez3P3qKHKK1QCOQvMttMnT3JaRMAx6CPbh_kppQvWUgLhFDvXCrJ2fxMIsDpVRjP0zDm8IHL4KH_vlP6OjkZmM7DWzgaPyxpxVPCNq-u8Pj_6jm2IbQIAhHLoTAxwdg4fDElYivnvqlD00RdAICissWvqk2MDFT3t_pu7oZcEf7-7NCK0VCm1p7KCS0VqAyENthZmOFwE1UEFjXHUEfaIQ%3D%3D)
---
I served as Florida’s Chief Financial Officer with Ron DeSantis, and I was proud to be a part of the team that helped make our state the strongest in America. **With our House Majority razor-thin, we need to make sure Matt Gaetz’s replacement is a fierce ally of President Trump and will vote to pass his MAGA agenda. As a day one supporter of President Trump, I have decided to resign from my statewide office to run for Florida's 1st Congressional District and be a steadfast conservative voice for this country.** **[Democrats are seeing this Special Election as an opportunity to tighten the majority and ruin Trump’s plans to restore America. That’s why I need you on my team, and why I need you to fuel this fight.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c4f4144473fc40b4a8ca83121960ddd4&_e=m0U4-FJPREfjMivprfbPnB4ucpivuo10y3wOJoMzdEmDUgxDDbOKgu13ExwxvdLMMRO1h2KOG7Dc01aZVjDVaBTstCJGsQ9hCteyl1nS-a3GIeY92wm4q0fXR0lZc-EEamnO8pKuSXAKiRV2W0j8Vzdxiyc7OdWO9K6NUxosNB9vjvbWK5HQGig2s1poDNdzlI7NYiDC--_nOnlUx1v-3EcNq1Qjc9XNAv4Svk0mqwBgH-dbGtYDqcu6DSC4o_Z5dikrh2sazBMVehWh4CjBbKobp9KP3DZjGR0qxp-l8ffaokftLavuqC8Zwyl_QoLvnq6rheDCYgu11xetAu0bfZpqKZzIsx1MMOwtIDjbKypN98GmrskUkcjDFmz9X2JR)**
---
[**HELP SEND JIMMY TO CONGRESS**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c4f4144473fc40b4a8ca83121960ddd4&_e=m0U4-FJPREfjMivprfbPnB4ucpivuo10y3wOJoMzdEmDUgxDDbOKgu13ExwxvdLMMRO1h2KOG7Dc01aZVjDVaBTstCJGsQ9hCteyl1nS-a3GIeY92wm4q0fXR0lZc-EEamnO8pKuSXAKiRV2W0j8Vzdxiyc7OdWO9K6NUxosNB9vjvbWK5HQGig2s1poDNdzlI7NYiDC--_nOnlUx1v-3Lu7pXikEmq8RvPLqcXbXVOBbW4ZkYcsqcO619zvRYl70OjvZF_lIoM-MiW_KlAYjZXuDrEgk6DqtjVviLHhR5o4o_eiB9y12XhwYEixZm3GBkESoVFKzakYzDl0flJsWWCXe3YzGlQWVzCXL4sW1o_bQ7vGN2rUBUoT246iEWeA)
---
President Trump trusts me to enact his America FIRST agenda in Congress because he knows I’m 100% MAGA. That’s why President Trump FULLY endorsed me in this race.

We must get our message to voters, and if you’re a proud Trump voter, I need you to step up and make sure we hold onto this seat. [**Can you chip in a donation to support my America-First campaign for Congress?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c4f4144473fc40b4a8ca83121960ddd4&_e=m0U4-FJPREfjMivprfbPnB4ucpivuo10y3wOJoMzdEmDUgxDDbOKgu13ExwxvdLMMRO1h2KOG7Dc01aZVjDVaBTstCJGsQ9hCteyl1nS-a3GIeY92wm4q0fXR0lZc-EEamnO8pKuSXAKiRV2W0j8Vzdxiyc7OdWO9K6NUxosNB9vjvbWK5HQGig2s1poDNdzlI7NYiDC--_nOnlUx1v-3Ku-c1Rkdpzlk2t2a0OGZwI8n_6masTt0SIa5VPf87lhUZFio7VNlCKPoZGB6bB_es63QoOfcH5ENboSBGD623WRJUWKxuQ_xWFjV3aBNIfG_hTLa0qfveJN6pKaoAgi8RjnZXtt3Ham4DQqMcYTPFoQU18pRjumvqGA1AZEDB90)
---
[**HELP SEND A MAGA WARRIOR TO CONGRESS**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c4f4144473fc40b4a8ca83121960ddd4&_e=m0U4-FJPREfjMivprfbPnB4ucpivuo10y3wOJoMzdEmDUgxDDbOKgu13ExwxvdLMMRO1h2KOG7Dc01aZVjDVaBTstCJGsQ9hCteyl1nS-a3GIeY92wm4q0fXR0lZc-EEamnO8pKuSXAKiRV2W0j8Vzdxiyc7OdWO9K6NUxosNB9vjvbWK5HQGig2s1poDNdzlI7NYiDC--_nOnlUx1v-3O9rIuFfweesaOXZwGhApu4FBqk6FWJ8K8-25CLHIBmFutnmSkVZDU8WnihFo6-9v5sy7ay8yBm5F7dxse-9upfwrTKJrBPsPLhxgi52KdKFaCWAVgQRBHV8zfBcVoWqA9D7svuRzl22Wjq-VG9vYKPZ7V-UkNJK9RIwUP_cJOGM)

name: Ami Bera
subject: Happy Holidays, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter — Happy Holidays!

As we spend the holidays with loved ones, let’s strive to remember not what divides us, but what we have in common as Californians and as Americans.
